190101.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏥᎨᏒ, ᎢᏴᏛᎭᏉ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᏕᎧᏁᏤᎮ ᏗᎩᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏕᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ,
190101.english: God, who at sundry times and in divers manners spake in time past unto the fathers by the prophets,
190101.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi i-lv-hi-yu tsi-ge-sv, i-yv-dv-ha-quo a-le tsu-da-le-nv-dv gv-ta-nv-hi tsi-de-ka-ne-tse-he di-gi-ga-yv-li-ge a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi de-gv-di-s-gv-i,

190102.cherokee: ᎪᎯ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒ ᎢᎩᏁᏤᎸ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏮᏔᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᎧᏅ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏚᏬᏢᏁᎢ;
190102.english: Hath in these last days spoken unto us by his Son, whom he hath appointed heir of all things, by whom also he made the worlds;
190102.phonetic: Go-hi u-li-s-qua-lv-di de-ge-sa-di-sv i-gi-ne-tse-lv U-we-tsi u-wv-ta-nv, na-s-gi u-we-ka-nv u-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv, na-s-gi na-s-quo gv-di-s-gv e-lo-hi du-wo-tlv-ne-i;

190103.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎦᎸᏌᏓᏗᏍᎩ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏥᏚᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏕᎬᎩ ᏥᎬᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏓᏛᏔᏅ ᎤᏅᎦᎸᎭ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᎤᏪᏁᎢ ᎠᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ.
190103.english: Who being the brightness of his glory, and the express image of his person, and upholding all things by the word of his power, when he had by himself purged our sins, sat down on the right hand of the Majesty on high;
190103.phonetic: Na-s-gi di-ga-lv-sa-da-di-s-gi tsi-ge-sv-gi u-tse-li ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i, a-le na-s-gi-ya di-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-ge-sv-gi na-s-gi nu-s-dv-i, a-le ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv tsi-du-s-qua-ni-go-di-de-gv-gi tsi-gv-di-s-gv-gi u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ka-ne-gv-i, na-hi-yu u-wa-sv u-da-dv-ta-nv u-nv-ga-lv-ha i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, u-we-ne-i a-ga-ti-si-di-tlv Ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv ga-lv-la-di.

190104.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏳᏓᎵᏁᎯᏯᏛ ᎾᎬᏁᎴ ᎡᏍᎦ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏘᏯᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏧᏙᏍᏙᏗ ᏧᏩᏛᏔᏅ.
190104.english: Being made so much better than the angels, as he hath by inheritance obtained a more excellent name than they.
190104.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-ga-i u-tli i-yu-da-li-ne-hi-ya-dv na-gv-ne-le e-s-ga di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi, na-s-gi u-ti-ya-s-da-ne-di ge-sv u-tli i-ga-lv-quo-di tsu-do-s-do-di tsu-wa-dv-ta-nv.

190105.cherokee: ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏙᎯᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎪ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎶᎢ, ᎠᏇᏥ ᏂᎯ ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᏍᏆᏕᎲᏏ?  ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ; ᎠᏴ ᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎠᏯᏥ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ?
190105.english: For unto which of the angels said he at any time, Thou art my Son, this day have I begotten thee? And again, I will be to him a Father, and he shall be to me a Son?
190105.phonetic: Di-ni-ka-hna-wa-do-hi-ye-no ge-sv ga-go i-lv-hi-yu hi-a nu-we-se-lo-i, A-que-tsi ni-hi go-hi i-ga s-qua-de-hv-si?  A-le na-s-quo hi-a; a-yv Tsi-ga-yv-li-ge ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi-no na A-ya-tsi ge-se-s-di?

190106.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᏕᏁᎸᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏫᎬᏩᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏏ.
190106.english: And again, when he bringeth in the firstbegotten into the world, he saith, And let all the angels of God worship him.
190106.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo, na-hi-yu i-gv-yi u-de-ne-lv-hi e-lo-hi u-na-nu-go-wi-sv hi-a nu-we-se-i; A-le na-ni-v di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi u-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li wi-gv-wa-da-do-li-s-da-si.

190107.cherokee: ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏕᎦᏪᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎤᏃᎴ ᏥᏂᏕᎬᏁᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎠᏓᏪᎳᎩᏍᎩ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏥᏂᎬᏁᎭ.
190107.english: And of the angels he saith, Who maketh his angels spirits, and his ministers a flame of fire.
190107.phonetic: Di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no hi-a ni-de-ga-we-se-ha, Na-s-gi di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi tsu-tse-li u-no-le tsi-ni-de-gv-ne-ha, a-le a-tsi-lv a-da-we-la-gi-s-gi tsu-nv-si-da-s-di tsi-ni-gv-ne-ha.

190108.cherokee: ᎤᏪᏥᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏎᎭ, ᏣᏤᎵ ᎦᏍᎩᎸ, ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏂᎬᏩᏍᏗᏉ; ᎠᏙᎳᏅᏍᏗ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎠᏛᏁᏙᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏙᎳᏅᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏨᏗᎭ ᎾᎿᎭᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190108.english: But unto the Son he saith, Thy throne, O God, is for ever and ever: a sceptre of righteousness is the sceptre of thy kingdom.
190108.phonetic: U-we-tsi-s-gi-ni hi-a ni-ga-we-se-ha, Tsa-tse-li ga-s-gi-lv, Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi, ni-go-hi-lv a-le ni-go-hi-lv ni-gv-wa-s-di-quo; a-do-la-nv-s-di du-yu-go-dv a-dv-ne-do-di na-s-gi a-do-la-nv-s-di go-hu-s-di tsv-di-ha na-hna tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

190109.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᏣᏰᎸᏅ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂᏆᏘᎸ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏣᎶᏁᏔᏅ ᎠᏠᏁᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᏣᎵᎪᎯ.
190109.english: Thou hast loved righteousness, and hated iniquity; therefore God, even thy God, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows.
190109.phonetic: O-si-yu tsa-ye-lv-nv du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i; a-le tsa-ni-qua-ti-lv u-yo ge-sv-i, na-s-gi i-yu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi ni-hi Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi u-tli i-ga-i tsa-lo-ne-ta-nv a-tlo-ne-di o-s-dv a-da-da-nv-da-di-s-di-s-gi, e-s-ga-quo na-s-gi na i-tsa-li-go-hi.

190110.cherokee: ᎠᎴ, ᎾᏍᏉ [ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ] ᏂᎯ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎦᎫᏍᏓᎥ ᏣᏁᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏗᏦᏰᏂ ᏦᏢᏔᏁᎢ;
190110.english: And, Thou, Lord, in the beginning hast laid the foundation of the earth; and the heavens are the works of thine hands:
190110.phonetic: A-le, na-s-quo [hi-a ni-ga-we-ha] Ni-hi, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, di-da-le-ni-s-gv e-lo-hi ga-gu-s-da-v tsa-ne-i; a-le ga-lv-lo-i di-tso-ye-ni tso-tlv-ta-ne-i;

190111.cherokee: ᏛᎾᎵᏛᏔᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏁᏣᏛᏁᏍᏗᏉ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏓᏳᏁᏔᏥ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ;
190111.english: They shall perish; but thou remainest; and they all shall wax old as doth a garment;
190111.phonetic: Dv-na-li-dv-ta-ni na-s-gi; ni-hi-s-gi-ni ne-tsa-dv-ne-s-di-quo; a-le na-s-gi ni-ga-dv da-yu-ne-ta-tsi a-nu-wo na-s-gi-ya-i;

190112.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏔᏃᎯ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏙᏘᏇᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏁᏟᏴᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏁᏣᏍᏗᏉ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᏕᏘᏱᎶᏍᎬ ᎥᏝ ᏭᏍᏘᏥᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ.
190112.english: And as a vesture shalt thou fold them up, and they shall be changed: but thou art the same, and thy years shall not fail.
190112.phonetic: A-le u-ta-no-hi a-nu-wo na-s-gi-ya do-ti-que-nv-hi, a-le di-ga-ne-tli-yv-dv ge-se-s-di; ni-hi-s-gi-ni ne-tsa-s-di-quo, a-le de-tsa-de-ti-yi-lo-s-gv v-tla wu-s-ti-tsi-hi-s-di yi-gi.

190113.cherokee: ᎦᏙᎨ ᎤᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎶᎢ, ᏥᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ ᏦᎴᏍᏗ ᎬᏂ ᎨᏤᏍᎦᎩ ᎦᏍᎩᎶ ᏗᏣᎳᏏᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏥᏴᏁᎸᎭ?
190113.english: But to which of the angels said he at any time, Sit on my right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool?
190113.phonetic: Ga-do-ge u-s-di di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ge-sv hi-a nu-we-se-lo-i, Tsi-ga-ti-si-di-tlv tso-le-s-di gv-ni ge-tse-s-ga-gi ga-s-gi-lo di-tsa-la-si-di-yi ni-ga-tsi-yv-ne-lv-ha?

190114.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᏧᏂᏍᏕᎸᎯᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ?
190114.english: Are they not all ministering spirits, sent forth to minister for them who shall be heirs of salvation?
190114.phonetic: Tla-s-go na-s-gi na ni-ga-dv di-da-nv-do ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di yi-gi, ge-tsi-nv-si-dv tsu-ni-s-de-lv-hi-da-s-di-yi na-s-gi na a-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv u-na-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di tsi-gi?

190201.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎢᎦᎦᏌᏯᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᎦᏛᎦᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏗᎬᏍᎦᎶᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
190201.english: Therefore we ought to give the more earnest heed to the things which we have heard, lest at any time we should let them slip.
190201.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-tli i-ga-i i-ga-ga-sa-ya-s-do-di yi-ni-ga-li-s-da nu-s-dv i-ga-dv-ga-nv-i, na-s-gi i-lv-hi-yu di-gv-s-ga-lo-i-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

190202.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏥᏍᏛᏗᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ;
190202.english: For if the word spoken by angels was stedfast, and every transgression and disobedience received a just recompence of reward;
190202.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no ka-no-he-dv di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-nv-ne-lv-hi ge-sv u-li-ni-gi-di-yu yi-gi, a-le nu-da-le-sv a-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi ge-sv a-le nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv du-yu-go-dv ge-tsi-s-dv-di-ta-nv-hi yi-gi;

190203.cherokee: ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏱᏓᏚᏓᎳᎩ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎦᎦᏌᏯᏍᏔᏅᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏧᎴᏅᎲ ᏧᏃᎮᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏥᎨᎩᏍᏓᏱᏕᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎬᏩᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ;
190203.english: How shall we escape, if we neglect so great salvation; which at the first began to be spoken by the Lord, and was confirmed unto us by them that heard him;
190203.phonetic: Ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da yi-da-du-da-la-gi, i-yu-no ni-ga-ga-sa-ya-s-ta-nv-na yi-gi na-s-gi i-ga-lv-quo-di a-li-s-de-lv-do-di; na-s-gi i-gv-yi tsu-le-nv-hv tsu-no-he-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi, a-le na-s-gi a-yv tsi-ge-gi-s-da-yi-de-lv-gi na-s-gi na gv-wa-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi;

190204.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏕᎪᎯᏳᏓᏁᎲᎩ, ᏕᎬᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190204.english: God also bearing them witness, both with signs and wonders, and with divers miracles, and gifts of the Holy Ghost, according to his own will?
190204.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-quo de-go-hi-yu-da-ne-hv-gi, de-gv-di-s-gv-gi u-ye-lv-dv a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di, a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do u-da-ne-di ge-sv na-s-gi-ya u-wa-sv o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i.

190205.cherokee: ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏱᏂᏚᏩᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏗᏁᎢᏍᏗᎭ.
190205.english: For unto the angels hath he not put in subjection the world to come, whereof we speak.
190205.phonetic: Di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-ye-no v-tla nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi yi-ni-du-wa-ne-lv na-s-gi na-hna e-lo-hi u-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di tsi-ge-sv-gi, na-s-gi tsi-di-ne-i-s-di-ha.

190206.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎤᏁᏤ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏯᏓᏅᏖᏍᎪᎢ?  ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏯᎦᏔᏂᎯᎰᎢ?
190206.english: But one in a certain place testified, saying, What is man, that thou art mindful of him? or the son of man, that thou visitest him?
190206.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-s-gi-ni i-lv-hi-tlv u-ne-tse, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ga-do yv-wi na-s-gi tsi-ya-da-nv-te-s-go-i?  a-le yv-wi u-we-tsi, na-s-gi tsi-ya-ga-ta-ni-hi-ho-i?

190207.cherokee: ᎤᏍᏗᎩᏛᏉᏰᏃ ᎡᏍᎦ ᏂᏴᏁᎸ ᏂᎩᏴᏁᎸ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ; ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏌᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎯᏍᏚᎶᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏂᏴᏁᎸ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏦᏢᏅᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190207.english: Thou madest him a little lower than the angels; thou crownedst him with glory and honour, and didst set him over the works of thy hands:
190207.phonetic: U-s-di-gi-dv-quo-ye-no e-s-ga ni-yv-ne-lv ni-gi-yv-ne-lv di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi; di-gv-wa-lv-sa-da a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv hi-s-du-lo-ta-nv, a-le u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi ni-yv-ne-lv go-hu-s-di tso-tlv-nv-nv-hi ge-sv-i.

190208.cherokee: ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏧᎳᏏᏕᏂ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏂᏕᏨᏁᎸ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏥᏄᏩᏁᎴᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏳᏃᎯᏰ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏄᏩᏁᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏗᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᏱᎾᎬᏁᎸ.
190208.english: Thou hast put all things in subjection under his feet. For in that he put all in subjection under him, he left nothing that is not put under him. But now we see not yet all things put under him.
190208.phonetic: Nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di tsu-la-si-de-ni ha-wi-ni-di-tlv ni-de-tsv-ne-lv.  Na-s-gi-ye-no ni-ga-dv ha-wi-ni-di-tlv tsi-nu-wa-ne-le-i, v-tla go-hu-s-di yu-no-hi-ye na-s-gi ha-wi-ni-di-tlv nu-wa-ne-lv-na ge-sv-i.  A-se-no go-hi ge-sv v-tla yi-di-go-wa-ti-ha ni-ga-dv ha-wi-ni-di-tlv yi-na-gv-ne-lv.

190209.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᏗᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏗᎩᏛ ᎡᏍᎦ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎨᎬᏁᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏌᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᏍᏕᎶᏔᏅ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᏧᏲᎱᏎᏗᏱ.
190209.english: But we see Jesus, who was made a little lower than the angels for the suffering of death, crowned with glory and honour; that he by the grace of God should taste death for every man.
190209.phonetic: Tsi-sa-s-gi-ni e-di-go-wa-ti-ha na-s-gi u-s-di-gi-dv e-s-ga i-ya-gv-ne-lv-hi di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ge-sv ni-ge-gv-ne-lv-i, na-s-gi u-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi, di-gv-wa-lv-sa-dv a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv a-tsi-s-de-lo-ta-nv; na-s-gi nv-da-yu-li-s-do-di-yi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv gv-di-s-gv na-ni-v yv-wi tsu-yo-hu-se-di-yi.

190210.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᎪᏢᎾᏁᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎪᏢᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏌᏛ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏫᏓᏘᏃᎯᎲ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏧᏪᏥ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᏗᏩᏛᎡᎯ, ᏂᎦᎷᎶᎬᎾ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ.
190210.english: For it became him, for whom are all things, and by whom are all things, in bringing many sons unto glory, to make the captain of their salvation perfect through sufferings.
190210.phonetic: A-se-ye-no na-s-gi i-yu-dv-ne-di ge-se-i, na-s-gi na nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di a-go-tlv-na-ne-lv-hi, a-le na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di go-tlv-nv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi di-gv-wa-lv-sa-dv di-ge-sv wi-da-ti-no-hi-hv u-ni-tsa-ti tsu-we-tsi, na-s-gi u-na-li-s-de-lv-do-di di-wa-dv-e-hi, ni-ga-lu-lo-gv-na i-ya-gv-ne-di-yi a-gi-li-yo-gv-i.

190211.cherokee: ᎢᏧᎳᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᎦᏅᎦᎵᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏅᎦᎵᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᏠᏱᏉ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᏳᏰᎸᎭ ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᏧᏬᏎᏗᏱ;
190211.english: For both he that sanctifieth and they who are sanctified are all of one: for which cause he is not ashamed to call them brethren,
190211.phonetic: I-tsu-la-ye-no na-s-gi na di-ga-nv-ga-li-s-gi ge-sv a-le na-s-gi ge-tsi-nv-ga-li-s-gi ge-sv u-ni-tlo-yi-quo; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di v-tla u-de-ho-hi-s-di yu-ye-lv-ha o-tsa-li-nv-tli tsu-wo-se-di-yi;

190212.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏕᏣᏙᎥ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᎦᏥᏴᏁᎵ ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ; ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏙᏓᎬᏃᎩᏍᏔᏂ.
190212.english: Saying, I will declare thy name unto my brethren, in the midst of the church will I sing praise unto thee.
190212.phonetic: Hi-a tsi-nu-we-se-i, De-tsa-do-v gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-ga-tsi-yv-ne-li o-tsa-li-nv-tli; tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv a-ye-li do-da-gv-no-gi-s-ta-ni.

190213.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏥᏯᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏔᏂ.  ᎠᎴᏬ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎩᎧᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190213.english: And again, I will put my trust in him. And again, Behold I and the children which God hath given me.
190213.phonetic: A-le ta-li-ne-i, Na-s-gi da-tsi-ya-li-s-ga-s-do-ta-ni.  A-le-wo, Gv-ni-yu-quo a-yv a-le na-s-gi na di-ni-yo-li U-ne-la-nv-hi di-gi-ka-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

190214.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏂᏲᎵ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎬ ᎤᏂᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᏩᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏠᏯᏍᏔᏁ ᎤᎩᏎᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎤᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᏥᎩ.
190214.english: Forasmuch then as the children are partakers of flesh and blood, he also himself likewise took part of the same; that through death he might destroy him that had the power of death, that is, the devil;
190214.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi di-ni-yo-li u-ni-que-da-li a-le gi-gv u-ni-ne-hi tsi-gi, u-wa-sv na-s-quo na-s-gi u-tlo-ya-s-ta-ne u-gi-se-i; na-s-gi a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi a-se-quo-quo i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi na-s-gi na a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv u-li-ni-gv-gv u-hi, na-s-gi a-s-gi-na tsi-gi.

190215.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏧᏭᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂᎾᏰᏍᎬ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨ ᏓᏅᏅ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᏧᎾᏓᏲᏒᎯ ᏥᎨᏒ ᏕᎨᏥᎾᏝᎥᎢ.
190215.english: And deliver them who through fear of death were all their lifetime subject to bondage.
190215.phonetic: A-le tsu-wu-da-le-s-di-yi na-s-gi na a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv a-ni-na-ye-s-gv tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-di-s-ge da-nv-nv i-go-hi-dv tsu-na-da-yo-sv-hi tsi-ge-sv de-ge-tsi-na-tla-v-i.

190216.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏱᏚᏬᏯᏁᏎᎢ, ᎡᏆᎭᎻᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏚᏬᏯᏁᏎᎢ.
190216.english: For verily he took not on him the nature of angels; but he took on him the seed of Abraham.
190216.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ye-no v-tla di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi yi-du-wo-ya-ne-se-i, E-qua-ha-mi-s-gi-ni u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv du-wo-ya-ne-se-i.

190217.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏄᏛᏅᏅ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏓᎵᏍᏛᎾ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏴᏫ;
190217.english: Wherefore in all things it behoved him to be made like unto his brethren, that he might be a merciful and faithful high priest in things pertaining to God, to make reconciliation for the sins of the people.
190217.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di du-yu-go-dv-gi ni-ga-v nu-dv-nv-nv a-na-li-nv-tli na-s-gi-ya nu-na-s-dv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi u-da-do-li-s-di a-le nu-da-li-s-dv-na nu-gv-wi-yu-sv A-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi a-gu-yv-do-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv yv-wi;

190218.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᏨᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᎪᎵᏰᏍᎬᎢ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏗᎬᏩᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎨᏥᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ.
190218.english: For in that he himself hath suffered being tempted, he is able to succour them that are tempted.
190218.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no u-wa-sv u-gi-li-yo-tsv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi a-tsi-go-li-ye-s-gv-i ye-li-quo di-gv-wa-s-de-lv-di nu-li-s-ta-nv na-s-gi na ge-tsi-go-li-ye-s-gi.

190301.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏣᏠᏯᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎥᏓᏘᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎡᏣᏓᏅᏛᎵ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎶᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᏓᏁᎶᏗ ᏥᎩ.
190301.english: Wherefore, holy brethren, partakers of the heavenly calling, consider the Apostle and High Priest of our profession, Christ Jesus;
190301.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di e-tsi-lv-quo-di i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsa-tlo-ya-s-di-s-gi ga-lv-la-di u-gv-wa-li v-da-ti-ya-nv-di ge-sv-i, e-tsa-da-nv-dv-li Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa A-tsi-nv-si-dv a-le nu-gv-wi-yu-sv A-tsi-lv-ge-lo-hi na-s-gi tse-da-ne-lo-di tsi-gi.

190302.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏓᏍᏔᏅᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏁᏤᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎼᏏ ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ ᏥᎨᏎ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᏓᏘᎾᎥᎢ.
190302.english: Who was faithful to him that appointed him, as also Moses was faithful in all his house.
190302.phonetic: Na-s-gi nu-li-da-s-ta-nv-na ge-sv na-s-gi na u-ne-tse-lv-hi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo Mo-si nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na tsi-ge-se ni-ga-v du-da-ti-na-v-i.

190303.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏟ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏥᏰᎸᏎ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎼᏏ, ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᏁᏍᎨᎲᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏐ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎠᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
190303.english: For this man was counted worthy of more glory than Moses, inasmuch as he who hath builded the house hath more honour than the house.
190303.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya u-tli a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu a-tsi-ye-lv-se e-s-ga-quo Mo-si, gi-lo-ye-no a-da-ne-lv u-ne-s-ge-hv-hi u-tli a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-so e-s-ga-quo a-da-ne-lv-i.

190304.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏰᏃ ᏓᏓᏁᎸ ᎩᎶ ᏧᏬᏢᏅᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
190304.english: For every house is builded by some man; but he that built all things is God.
190304.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-ye-no da-da-ne-lv gi-lo tsu-wo-tlv-nv-hi ge-so-i; na-s-gi na ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-wo-tlv-nv-hi ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi.

190305.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎼᏏ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᏓᏘᎾᎥᎢ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᏗ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ.
190305.english: And Moses verily was faithful in all his house, as a servant, for a testimony of those things which were to be spoken after;
190305.phonetic: A-le mo-si u-do-hi-yu-hi nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na ge-sv-gi ni-ga-v du-da-ti-na-v-i a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di na-s-gi-ya-i, na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi na tsu-da-le-nv-dv gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-di tsi-ge-se-i.

190306.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎦᏅᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏚᏓᏘᎾᎥᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏚᏓᏘᎾᎥ ᎢᏖᎳ ᏥᎩ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏱᏗᎩᏂᏴᎭ ᎬᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏓᏢᏈᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190306.english: But Christ as a son over his own house; whose house are we, if we hold fast the confidence and the rejoicing of the hope firm unto the end.
190306.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-s-gi-ni a-ga-nv-gi na-s-gi-ya nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na ge-sv-gi u-wa-sv du-da-ti-na-v-i; na-s-gi na du-da-ti-na-v i-te-la tsi-gi, i-yu-no u-li-ni-gi-dv yi-di-gi-ni-yv-ha gv-li-s-qua-di-s-gi na-s-gi na i-ga-li-s-ga-s-do-dv a-le i-da-tlv-qui-s-do-di-s-gv u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv-i.

190307.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎧᏁᎬ ᎢᏣᏛᎪᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ,
190307.english: Wherefore (as the Holy Ghost saith, To day if ye will hear his voice,
190307.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do hi-a tsi-ni-ga-we-ha, Go-hi i-ga i-yu-no ka-ne-gv i-tsa-dv-go-di-yi i-tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di,

190308.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏥᏍᏓᏲᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸ ᏥᎬᎩᎾᎸᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᏥᎬᎩᎪᎵᏰᎥᎩ ᎢᎾᎨᎢ;
190308.english: Harden not your hearts, as in the provocation, in the day of temptation in the wilderness:
190308.phonetic: Tle-s-di yi-di-tsi-s-da-yo-di-s-ge-s-di di-tsi-na-wi, na-s-gi-ya nu-na-dv-ne-lv tsi-gv-gi-na-lv-s-ta-nv-gi, na-hi-yu i-ga tsi-gv-gi-go-li-ye-v-gi i-na-ge-i;

190309.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳ ᏗᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏥᎬᎩᎪᎵᏰᏍᎬᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎬᏆᎦᏘᏍᎬᎩ, ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬᎩᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏅᎦᏍᎪᎯ ᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ.
190309.english: When your fathers tempted me, proved me, and saw my works forty years.
190309.phonetic: Na-hi-yu di-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge tsi-gv-gi-go-li-ye-s-gv-gi, a-le tsi-gv-qua-ga-ti-s-gv-gi, a-ni-go-wa-ti-s-gv-gi-s-gi-ni-no-nv da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv nv-ga-s-go-hi tsu-de-ti-yv-dv.

190310.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎦᏥᏂᏉᏘᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᎩᏪᏒᎩ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏚᎴᎾᎯᎭ ᏧᏂᎾᏫ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏂᎦᏙᎥᏒᎯ ᏱᎩ ᏓᎩᏅᏅᎢ.
190310.english: Wherefore I was grieved with that generation, and said, They do always err in their heart; and they have not known my ways.
190310.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ga-tsi-ni-quo-ti-lv-gi na-s-gi na yv-wi, a-le hi-a na-gi-we-sv-gi, Ni-go-hi-lv du-le-na-hi-ha tsu-ni-na-wi; a-le v-tla u-ni-ga-do-v-sv-hi yi-gi da-gi-nv-nv-i.

190311.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏆᏎᎵᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᎩᏔᎳᏬᏍᎬ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏳ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎠᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190311.english: So I sware in my wrath, They shall not enter into my rest.)
190311.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi a-qua-se-li-ta-nv-gi a-gi-ta-la-wo-s-gv, Na-s-gi u-ni-yv-s-di-yu ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv a-qua-tse-li a-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di-yi ge-sv-i.

190312.cherokee: ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏞᏍᏗᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᎯᏍᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᎾᏫ ᏳᏯᎡᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᎡᎯ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
190312.english: Take heed, brethren, lest there be in any of you an evil heart of unbelief, in departing from the living God.
190312.phonetic: I-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di, i-da-li-nv-tli, tle-s-di-quo ni-hi gi-lo u-wo-hi-yu-hi-s-dv ni-ge-sv-na u-na-wi yu-ya-e-s-di, na-s-gi a-da-nv-e-hi gv-ni-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi.

190313.cherokee: ᏕᏣᏓᏬᏂᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒᎢ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎦᎪᏎᏗ ᏥᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎩᎶ ᎨᏥᏍᏓᏲᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
190313.english: But exhort one another daily, while it is called To day; lest any of you be hardened through the deceitfulness of sin.
190313.phonetic: De-tsa-da-wo-ni-di-s-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv-i, a-si-quo Go-hi i-ga ga-go-se-di tsi-gi; na-s-gi ni-hi gi-lo ge-tsi-s-da-yo-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-da-li-da-s-di a-s-ga-ni i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

190314.cherokee: ᏕᎦᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒᏰᏃ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏅᏩᏍᏗᏉ ᏕᎩᏂᏴᏒ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎬᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏔᏅᎢ;
190314.english: For we are made partakers of Christ, if we hold the beginning of our confidence stedfast unto the end;
190314.phonetic: De-ga-du-da-de-wi-sv-ye-no Ga-lo-ne-dv, i-yu-no yi-nv-wa-s-di-quo de-gi-ni-yv-sv u-li-ni-gi-dv gv-li-s-qua-di-s-gi i-gv-yi-yi i-ga-li-s-ga-s-do-ta-nv-i;

190315.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ ᎢᎩ, ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎧᏁᎬ ᎢᏣᏛᎪᏗᏱ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏥᏍᏓᏲᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᎬᎩᎾᎸᏍᏔᏅᎩ.
190315.english: While it is said, To day if ye will hear his voice, harden not your hearts, as in the provocation.
190315.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no i-ga-we-dv i-gi, Go-hi i-ga i-yu-no i-tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di ka-ne-gv i-tsa-dv-go-di-yi, tle-s-di yi-di-tsi-s-da-yo-di-s-ge-s-di di-tsi-na-wi, na-s-gi-ya nu-na-dv-ne-lv na-hi-yu tsi-gv-gi-na-lv-s-ta-nv-gi.

190316.cherokee: ᎦᎪᏰᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ, ᎤᏂᎿᎭᎸᏍᏔᏁᎢ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᏥᏈᏱ ᏂᏙᏓᏳᏗᏅᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᎾᏛᏁᎴᎢ?
190316.english: For some, when they had heard, did provoke: howbeit not all that came out of Egypt by Moses.
190316.phonetic: Ga-go-ye-no hna-quo u-na-dv-ga-nv, u-ni-hna-lv-s-ta-ne-i; tla-s-go ni-ga-dv I-tsi-qui-yi ni-do-da-yu-di-nv-s-ta-nv-hi Yi-si, na-s-gi yi-nu-na-dv-ne-le-i?

190317.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᏅᎦᏍᎪᎯ ᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᏚᏂᏆᏘᎴᎢ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᏂᏰᎸ ᎢᎾᎨ ᏥᏚᏅᏤᎢ?
190317.english: But with whom was he grieved forty years? was it not with them that had sinned, whose carcases fell in the wilderness?
190317.phonetic: A-le ga-go nv-ga-s-go-hi tsu-de-ti-yv-dv du-ni-qua-ti-le-i?  tla-s-go na-s-gi na u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi tsi-ge-se-i, na-s-gi na di-ni-ye-lv i-na-ge tsi-du-nv-tse-i?

190318.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᏚᏁᏤᎴ ᎠᏎᎵᏛᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏣᏪᏴᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎨᏎ Ꮎ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ?
190318.english: And to whom sware he that they should not enter into his rest, but to them that believed not?
190318.phonetic: A-le ga-go du-ne-tse-le a-se-li-dv-s-gv na-s-gi u-ni-yv-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv u-tse-li a-tsa-we-yv-lv-s-do-di-yi?  tla-s-go na-s-gi yi-ge-se na nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na tsi-ge-se-i?

190319.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᏗᎪᏩᏘᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏫᎬᏩᏂᏴᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏅᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190319.english: So we see that they could not enter in because of unbelief.
190319.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-nu-s-di i-di-go-wa-ti-ha na-s-gi wi-gv-wa-ni-yv-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv nu-no-hi-yu-nv-na ge-sv-i.

190401.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏗᎾᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏒᎩᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏫᎩᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏱᏅᎦᎵᏍᏓ ᏂᎯ ᎩᎶ ᎡᏍᎦ ᎢᏦᎭᏒᎢ.
190401.english: Let us therefore fear, lest, a promise being left us of entering into his rest, any of you should seem to come short of it.
190401.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-yv i-di-na-ye-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi sv-gi-du-i-s-da-ne-lv wi-gi-yv-s-di-yi tsi-gi u-tse-li a-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv yi-nv-ga-li-s-da ni-hi gi-lo e-s-ga i-tso-ha-sv-i.

190402.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎡᎦᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᏥᎨᎦᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ ᎥᏝ ᏅᏂᏍᏕᎸᎮᎢ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏓᏑᏴᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎾᏛᎩᏍᎬᎢ.
190402.english: For unto us was the gospel preached, as well as unto them: but the word preached did not profit them, not being mixed with faith in them that heard it.
190402.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv e-ga-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-gi, na-s-gi-ya-quo tsi-ge-ga-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-gi na-s-gi; a-se-no na-s-gi na ka-no-he-dv u-na-dv-ga-nv v-tla nv-ni-s-de-lv-he-i nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge go-hi-yu-di ge-sv nu-da-su-yv-na ge-sv a-na-dv-gi-s-gv-i.

190403.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎢᎪᎯᏳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏗᏴᎯᎭ ᎠᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏪᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏆᏎᎵᏔᏅ ᎠᎩᏔᎳᏬᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎠᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏍᏆᏛᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎨᏒᎩ ᏕᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᏙᏢᎤ ᎤᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᎤᏛ.
190403.english: For we which have believed do enter into rest, as he said, As I have sworn in my wrath, if they shall enter into my rest: although the works were finished from the foundation of the world.
190403.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no i-go-hi-yu-nv-hi ge-sv i-di-yv-hi-ha a-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di-yi ge-sv-i; na-s-gi-ya nu-we-sv-i, Na-s-gi-ya a-qua-se-li-ta-nv a-gi-ta-la-wo-s-gv-i, na-s-gi u-ni-yv-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv a-qua-tse-li a-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di-yi ge-sv-i; a-s-qua-dv-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv ge-sv-gi de-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv e-lo-hi tsu-do-tlv-u u-da-gv-wa-da-le-u-dv.

190404.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏢᏰᏃ ᎦᎵᏉᎩᏁ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᎵᏉᎩᏁ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏯᏪᏐᎴ ᎤᏲᎯᏍᏔᏁ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
190404.english: For he spake in a certain place of the seventh day on this wise, And God did rest the seventh day from all his works.
190404.phonetic: I-lv-hi-tlv-ye-no ga-li-quo-gi-ne i-ga u-ne-i-s-ta-nv hi-a nu-we-sv, A-le U-ne-la-nv-hi ga-li-quo-gi-ne i-ga u-ya-we-so-le u-yo-hi-s-ta-ne ni-ga-dv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

190405.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏴᎬᏂᏴᎭ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎠᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
190405.english: And in this place again, If they shall enter into my rest.
190405.phonetic: A-le a-ni ta-li-ne hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, V-tla yv-gv-ni-yv-ha a-qua-tse-li a-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di-yi.

190406.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏎ ᎾᎿᎭᏭᏂᏴᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎨᎦᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏄᏂᏴᎸᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190406.english: Seeing therefore it remaineth that some must enter therein, and they to whom it was first preached entered not in because of unbelief:
190406.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no gi-lo a-se na-hna wu-ni-yv-s-di tsi-gi, a-le na-s-gi na i-gv-yi ge-ga-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-hi ge-sv na-nu-ni-yv-lv-na tsi-ge-se-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv-i.

190407.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᎦ ᎠᏑᏰᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ ᎤᏬᎯᏨᎯ ᎣᏂ ᏕᏫ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎧᏁᎬ ᎢᏣᏛᎪᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏥᏍᏓᏲᏔᏁᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ.
190407.english: Again, he limiteth a certain day, saying in David, To day, after so long a time; as it is said, To day if ye will hear his voice, harden not your hearts.
190407.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo i-ga a-su-ye-ha, hi-a ni-ga-we-ha u-wo-hi-tsv-hi o-ni De-wi a-gv-di-s-gv-i, Go-hi i-ga, na-s-gi-ya hi-a i-ga-we-dv tsi-gi, Go-hi i-ga, i-yu-no ka-ne-gv i-tsa-dv-go-di-yi i-tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di, tle-s-di yi-di-tsi-s-da-yo-ta-ne-s-di di-tsi-na-wi.

190408.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏦᏑᏩ ᏱᏚᏁᎴ ᎤᎾᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᎣᏂ ᏱᎬᏩᏁᎢᏍᏔᏁ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎢᎦ.
190408.english: For if Jesus had given them rest, then would he not afterward have spoken of another day.
190408.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no Tso-su-wa yi-du-ne-le u-na-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di-yi, v-tla [U-ne-la-nv-hi] o-ni yi-gv-wa-ne-i-s-ta-ne nv-wa-da-le i-ga.

190409.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎤᎾᏘᏰᎭ ᎤᎾᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᏴᏫ.
190409.english: There remaineth therefore a rest to the people of God.
190409.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-si-quo u-na-ti-ye-ha u-na-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di-yi ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga yv-wi.

190410.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ Ꮎ ᎤᏴᎸᎯ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎤᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏲᎯᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏐ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏄᏛᏁᎸ ᎤᏲᎯᏍᏔᏅᎢ.
190410.english: For he that is entered into his rest, he also hath ceased from his own works, as God did from his.
190410.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no na u-yv-lv-hi tsi-ge-so u-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di-yi, na-s-quo u-yo-hi-s-ta-nv-hi ge-so du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv, na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi nu-dv-ne-lv u-yo-hi-s-ta-nv-i.

190411.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏓᏟᏂᎬᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏫᎩᏴᏍᏗᏱ, ᏱᏅᏎᎦᎩᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏕᎶᏆᎡᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏬᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏴᎦᏅᎢᏍᏓ.
190411.english: Let us labour therefore to enter into that rest, lest any man fall after the same example of unbelief.
190411.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-da-tli-ni-gv-ne-he-s-di wi-gi-yv-s-di-yi, yi-nv-se-ga-gi-ye-no gi-lo na-s-gi tsu-de-lo-qua-e-lv-hi ge-sv na-s-gi-ya nu-wo-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv yv-ga-nv-i-s-da.

190412.cherokee: ᎧᏃᎮᏛᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎬᏃᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᏂᎪᏍᏓᏴ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎢᏧᎳᏗᏢ ᏗᎬᎦᏘ ᏗᎪᏍᏓᏴ, ᏕᎦᏘᎭ ᏔᎵ ᏂᎦᏗᎭ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏫᏢᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏍᏛᏪᏙᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎬᏭᎪᏙᏗ ᎢᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎤᎾᏫ.
190412.english: For the word of God is quick, and powerful, and sharper than any twoedged sword, piercing even to the dividing asunder of soul and spirit, and of the joints and marrow, and is a discerner of the thoughts and intents of the heart.
190412.phonetic: Ka-no-he-dv-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga gv-no-dv, a-le u-li-ni-gi-di-yu a-le u-tli-hi-yu ni-go-s-da-yv e-s-ga-quo a-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv i-tsu-la-di-tlv di-gv-ga-ti di-go-s-da-yv, de-ga-ti-ha ta-li ni-ga-di-ha a-da-nv-te-di-yi a-le a-da-nv-do, a-le du-wi-tlv-i a-le du-s-dv-we-do-gv-i, a-le di-gv-wu-go-do-di i-gi nu-s-dv a-da-nv-te-s-gv a-le nu-s-dv u-du-li-s-gv u-na-wi.

190413.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎬᏍᎦᎳᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏰᎸᎭᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏞᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏙᏗᎧᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏰᏛᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎸᎢ.
190413.english: Neither is there any creature that is not manifest in his sight: but all things are naked and opened unto the eyes of him with whom we have to do.
190413.phonetic: V-tla a-le go-hu-s-di a-ne-la-nv-hi ge-sv a-gv-s-ga-la-ne-lv-hi yi-gi; ni-ga-di-yu-quo-s-gi-ni u-ye-lv-ha-i, a-le tsu-tle-dv na-s-gi do-di-ka-nv na-s-gi na gv-ni-ge-sv i-ye-dv-ne-di tsi-gi ni-ga-dv-ne-lv-i.

190414.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏗᎪᏩᏗᎭ ᎢᎩᎧᎲ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎶ ᏭᎶᏒᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᏕᎩᏂᏴᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏓᏁᎶᏛᎢ.
190414.english: Seeing then that we have a great high priest, that is passed into the heavens, Jesus the Son of God, let us hold fast our profession.
190414.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-di-go-wa-di-ha i-gi-ka-hv a-tsi-lv-quo-di nu-gv-wi-yu-sv A-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi, na-s-gi ga-lv-lo wu-lo-sv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi Tsi-sa U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi, a-s-da-ya de-gi-ni-yv-se-s-di de-da-ne-lo-dv-i.

190415.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏱᎩᎧᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᎩᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏕᎩᏩᏂᎦᎸᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏥᎪᎵᏰᎲᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎨᏒᎩ.
190415.english: For we have not an high priest which cannot be touched with the feeling of our infirmities; but was in all points tempted like as we are, yet without sin.
190415.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi yi-gi-ka-ha na-s-gi ge-gi-do-li-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv de-gi-wa-ni-ga-lv-i, ni-ga-v-quo-s-gi-ni a-tsi-go-li-ye-hv-gi a-yv na-s-gi-ya-i, a-se-no na-s-ga-nv-na ge-sv-gi.

190416.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᏗᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᎢᏗᎷᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏍᎩᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎩᏙᎵᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎩᏂᎬᏎᎲ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ.
190416.english: Let us therefore come boldly unto the throne of grace, that we may obtain mercy, and find grace to help in time of need.
190416.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-di-s-ga-i-hv-na i-di-lu-gi na-hna gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv ga-s-gi-lv-i, na-s-gi e-gi-do-li-s-di-yi, a-le i-gi-wa-dv-di-yi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi na-hi-yu i-gi-ni-gv-se-hv i-ga-li-s-de-lv-do-di.

190501.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏰᏃ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎨᎪᏣᎴᏛ, ᏴᏫ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏥᏁᏤᎰᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ [ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ] ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎬᏩᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎳᏍᏙᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ;
190501.english: For every high priest taken from among men is ordained for men in things pertaining to God, that he may offer both gifts and sacrifices for sins:
190501.phonetic: Na-ni-v-ye-no nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi ge-sv yv-wi a-ne-hv ge-go-tsa-le-dv, yv-wi o-s-dv i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di ge-tsi-ne-tse-ho-i, na-s-gi [tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi] U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-go-hi u-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi di-gv-wa-na-li-s-go-lv-do-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-da-ne-di ge-sv a-le a-tsi-lv-ge-la-s-do-di na-s-gi a-s-ga-ni u-gv-wa-li;

190502.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᏗᎬᏪᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎾᎥᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎾᎴᎾᎸᎯ; ᎤᏩᏒᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏚᎵᏚᏫᏍᏛᎩ ᎠᏩᏂᎦᎳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190502.english: Who can have compassion on the ignorant, and on them that are out of the way; for that he himself also is compassed with infirmity.
190502.phonetic: Na-s-gi ye-li di-gv-we-do-li-s-di na-ni-ga-ta-na-v-na, a-le na-s-gi na u-na-le-na-lv-hi; u-wa-sv-ye-no na-s-quo du-li-du-wi-s-dv-gi a-wa-ni-ga-la ge-sv-i.

190503.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎠᏎ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏐᎢ, ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190503.english: And by reason hereof he ought, as for the people, so also for himself, to offer for sins.
190503.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, na-s-gi yv-wi u-na-li-s-de-lv-do-di a-li-s-go-lv-di-s-gv na-s-quo u-wa-sv u-li-s-de-lv-do-di a-se u-li-s-go-lv-do-di ge-so-i, a-s-ga-ni u-gv-wa-li ge-sv-i.

190504.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ [ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ] ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᏯᎩᏍᎪᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏯᏅᏛ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎡᎵᏂ ᎠᏥᏯᏅᎲᎢ.
190504.english: And no man taketh this honour unto himself, but he that is called of God, as was Aaron.
190504.phonetic: V-tla a-le gi-lo hi-a na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di [di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di] u-wa-sv-quo u-da-nv-te-dv ya-gi-s-go-i, gv-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ya-nv-dv yi-gi na-s-gi-ya E-li-ni a-tsi-ya-nv-hv-i.

190505.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎯᎠ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏳᎩᏎ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎶᎯ ᎾᎬᏁᎸᎢ; ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏳᏪᏎᎸᎯ, ᎠᏇᏥ ᏂᎯ, ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᏍᏆᏕᎲᏏ, [ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏯᏅᎮᎢ.]
190505.english: So also Christ glorified not himself to be made an high priest; but he that said unto him, Thou art my Son, to day have I begotten thee.
190505.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo Ga-lo-ne-dv v-tla u-wa-sv hi-a ga-lv-quo-di di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di yu-gi-se nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv-ge-lo-hi na-gv-ne-lv-i; hi-a-s-gi-ni i-yu-we-se-lv-hi, A-que-tsi ni-hi, go-hi i-ga s-qua-de-hv-si, [na-s-gi u-ya-nv-he-i.]

190506.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎮᎶᎯ ᏂᎯ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ ᎺᎵᎩᏏᏕᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
190506.english: As he saith also in another place, Thou art a priest for ever after the order of Melchisedec.
190506.phonetic: Na-s-quo i-lv-hi-tlv hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, A-tsi-lv--he-lo-hi ni-hi ni-go-hi-lv-i Me-li-gi-si-de-gi nu-s-dv na-s-gi-ya-i.

190507.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎴᏂᏙᎸ, ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏔᏲᏎᎸ, ᎠᏍᏓᏴ ᏓᏠᏱᎲ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎦᏌᏬᎢᎲ ᎬᏩᏠᏯᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏔᏲᏎᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎬᏩᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎬᏭᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏛᎦᏁᎴ ᎦᎾᏰᏍᎬ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ;
190507.english: Who in the days of his flesh, when he had offered up prayers and supplications with strong crying and tears unto him that was able to save him from death, and was heard in that he feared;
190507.phonetic: Na-s-gi na na-hi-yu u-que-da-li ge-sv u-le-ni-do-lv, u-da-do-li-s-da-ne-lv a-le u-ta-yo-se-lv, a-s-da-yv da-tlo-yi-hv, a-le da-ga-sa-wo-i-hv gv-wa-tlo-ya-s-di na-s-gi na u-ta-yo-se-lv na-s-gi ye-li-quo gv-wa-s-de-lv-di gv-wu-da-le-s-di ge-sv a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-ga-dv-ga-ne-le ga-na-ye-s-gv u-gv-wa-li;

190508.cherokee: ᎤᏪᏥᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎨᏎᎢ ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᎯᏍᏓ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏕᎶᏆᎡ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᏨ ᎤᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏔᏁᎢ;
190508.english: Though he were a Son, yet learned he obedience by the things which he suffered;
190508.phonetic: U-we-tsi-s-gi-ni-no-nv ge-se-i a-se-no u-wo-hi-yu-hi-s-da i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-de-lo-qua-e u-gi-li-yo-tsv u-ga-do-v-hi-s-ta-ne-i;

190509.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏄᎪᎸᎾ ᎾᎬᏁᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏩᏘᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ;
190509.english: And being made perfect, he became the author of eternal salvation unto all them that obey him;
190509.phonetic: A-le nu-go-lv-na na-gv-ne-lv, na-s-gi a-wa-ti-s-gi nu-li-s-ta-ne wi-na-s-dv-na u-na-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv na-ni-v gv-wo-hi-yu-hv-s-gi;

190510.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎺᎵᎩᏏᏕᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏬᏎᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
190510.english: Called of God an high priest after the order of Melchisedec.
190510.phonetic: A-le nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi Me-li-gi-si-de-gi na-s-gi-ya u-wo-se-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi.

190511.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᏲᎦᏛᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏦᏍᏗᏳ ᏗᎪᏏᏐᏗᏱ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᏗᏥᏍᎦᏃᎵᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏛᎪᏗᏱ.
190511.english: Of whom we have many things to say, and hard to be uttered, seeing ye are dull of hearing.
190511.phonetic: Na-s-gi na o-tsi-no-he-s-gv u-tsa-ti go-hu-s-di ga-yo-ga-dv-di, a-le u-tso-s-di-yu di-go-si-so-di-yi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv di-tsi-s-ga-no-li-yu ge-sv i-tsa-dv-go-di-yi.

190512.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏗᎨᏣᏕᏲᏗ ᎡᏤᎵᏎᎸᎢ, ᎤᏚᎸᏗᏉ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᎩᎶ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᏤᏲᏗᏱ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᏗᏕᎶᏆᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏗ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎤᏴᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ.
190512.english: For when for the time ye ought to be teachers, ye have need that one teach you again which be the first principles of the oracles of God; and are become such as have need of milk, and not of strong meat.
190512.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-ye-no ye-li-quo di-ge-tsa-de-yo-di e-tse-li-se-lv-i, u-du-lv-di-quo ni-tsa-li-s-da-ne-ha gi-lo ta-li-ne i-tse-yo-di-yi nu-s-dv i-gv-yi-yi di-de-lo-qua-s-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li ka-no-he-dv; a-le u-nv-di u-na-du-li-s-gi na-s-gi-ya ni-tsa-li-s-ta-nv, v-tla-no u-yv-s-di a-li-s-da-yv-di.

190513.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏅᏗ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏂᎦᏙᎥᏒᎯ ᏱᎨᏐ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏗᏂᏲᎵᏉᏰᏃ.
190513.english: For every one that useth milk is unskillful in the word of righteousness: for he is a babe.
190513.phonetic: Na-ni-v-ye-no gi-lo u-nv-di a-na-li-s-da-yv-di-s-gi v-tla u-ni-ga-do-v-sv-hi yi-ge-so ka-no-he-dv a-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv-i; di-ni-yo-li-quo-ye-no.

190514.cherokee: ᎤᏴᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᏧᎾᏛᎾᏯ ᎤᏁᎵᏍᏓᏴᏙᏗ ᎨᏐᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏂᎩᏌᎲ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᎾᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏐ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190514.english: But strong meat belongeth to them that are of full age, even those who by reason of use have their senses exercised to discern both good and evil.
190514.phonetic: U-yv-s-di-s-gi-ni a-li-s-da-yv-di tsu-na-dv-na-ya u-ne-li-s-da-yv-do-di ge-so-i, na-s-gi na u-ni-gi-sa-hv i-yu-s-di gv-wa-na-do-le-ho-hi-s-di ge-so o-s-dv ge-sv nu-s-dv-i, a-le nu-s-dv u-yo ge-sv-i.

190601.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏗᎯᏯᏍᎬ ᎠᎴᏅᏙᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᏕᏲᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎦᎷᎶᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏫᏗᏰᎢᎶᎦ; ᏔᎵᏁ ᎦᎫᏍᏛᏗ ᏂᏗᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎦᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏓᏅᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᏓᎯᎯᏉ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
190601.english: Therefore leaving the principles of the doctrine of Christ, let us go on unto perfection; not laying again the foundation of repentance from dead works, and of faith toward God,
190601.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-di-hi-ya-s-gv a-le-nv-do-di Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li di-de-yo-di ge-sv-i, ni-ga-lu-lo-gv-na ge-sv i-yv-dv wi-di-ye-i-lo-ga; ta-li-ne ga-gu-s-dv-di ni-di-hv-s-gv-na ga-ne-tli-yv-s-di ge-sv o-da-nv-dv u-gv-wa-li, a-da-hi-hi-quo di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di tsi-gi, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i,

190602.cherokee: ᏗᏓᏬᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏕᏲᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏏᏔᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏧᎾᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
190602.english: Of the doctrine of baptisms, and of laying on of hands, and of resurrection of the dead, and of eternal judgment.
190602.phonetic: Di-da-wo-s-di ge-sv di-de-yo-nv-hi u-gv-wa-li, a-le di-da-si-ta-di-s-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, a-le tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi tsu-na-le-hi-so-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, a-le u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na di-gu-go-do-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li.

190603.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᏓᏛᏁᎵ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸ.
190603.english: And this will we do, if God permit.
190603.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi hi-a nv-da-da-dv-ne-li i-yu-no U-ne-la-nv-hi yi-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv.

190604.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎨᎦᏗᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏁᎶᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎨᎦᏠᏯᏍᏔᏅ ᎨᏥᏁᎸᎯ.
190604.english: For it is impossible for those who were once enlightened, and have tasted of the heavenly gift, and were made partakers of the Holy Ghost,
190604.phonetic: Gv-wa-tli-s-di-ye-no na-s-gi na i-lv-hi-yu i-ga ge-ga-di-s-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i, a-le u-na-ne-lo-ta-nv-hi ge-sv ga-lv-lo-i nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi a-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-le Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do ge-ga-tlo-ya-s-ta-nv ge-tsi-ne-lv-hi.

190605.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏁᎶᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
190605.english: And have tasted the good word of God, and the powers of the world to come,
190605.phonetic: A-le u-na-ne-lo-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, a-le u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv u-li-s-qua-lv-di ge-sv-i,

190606.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᏲᏒᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎬᏩᏟᏍᏗ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᏤ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎦᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᏭᏂᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᎤᏅᏒᏰᏃ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᎾᏓᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᎢᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᏕᎰᎯᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᎩ.
190606.english: If they shall fall away, to renew them again unto repentance; seeing they crucify to themselves the Son of God afresh, and put him to an open shame.
190606.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsu-ni-yo-sv-hi ge-sv-i, gv-wa-tli-s-di ta-li-ne i-tse i-ge-gv-ne-di-yi ga-ne-tli-yv-s-di ge-sv du-na-da-nv-dv wu-ni-lu-hi-s-di-yi; u-nv-sv-ye-no ta-li-ne u-na-da-dv-ne-lv-hi i-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi, a-le gv-ni-ge-sv gv-wa-de-ho-hi-s-ta-nv-hi i-gi.

190607.cherokee: ᎦᏙᎯᏰᏃ ᏣᏗᏔᏍᎪ ᎠᎹ ᏯᏃ ᎤᎦᎿᎭᏂᎯᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎪ ᎠᏛᏒᎥᏍᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏙᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᏙᎯ ᎨᏥᎶᎦᏁᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎾᏛᏁᎰᎢ.
190607.english: For the earth which drinketh in the rain that cometh oft upon it, and bringeth forth herbs meet for them by whom it is dressed, receiveth blessing from God:
190607.phonetic: Ga-do-hi-ye-no tsa-di-ta-s-go a-ma ya-no u-ga-hna-ni-hi-hv-i, a-le tsi-ga-na-nu-go-wi-s-go a-dv-sv-v-s-gi go-hu-s-di u-nv-do-di na-s-gi na ga-do-hi ge-tsi-lo-ga-ne-lv-hi, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi o-s-dv na-dv-ne-ho-i.

190608.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᏥᏍᏚᏂᎩᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎧᏄᎦᎸ ᎠᏛᏍᎬᎢ ᎠᏗᏅᏗᏉ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎦᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᏄᏍᏗᏕᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎪᎲᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ.
190608.english: But that which beareth thorns and briers is rejected, and is nigh unto cursing; whose end is to be burned.
190608.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na tsi-s-du-ni-gi-s-di a-le ka-nu-ga-lv a-dv-s-gv-i a-di-nv-di-quo, a-le a-s-ga-i-s-di-yi ge-sv na-v-ni-yu nu-s-di-de-go-i, na-s-gi u-li-s-qua-lv-di ge-sv a-go-hv-s-do-di tsi-gi.

190609.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ, ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᏅᏟᎯᏳ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᏨᏴᎾᏁᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏔᎵ ᎤᏛᏗᏕᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏃᏥᏪᎭ.
190609.english: But, beloved, we are persuaded better things of you, and things that accompany salvation, though we thus speak.
190609.phonetic: A-se-no, ni-hi ge-sv i-tsv-ge-yu-i, nv-tli-hi-yu o-s-dv u-du-gi i-tsv-yv-na-ne-ha, a-le a-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li ta-li u-dv-di-de-gv-i, hi-a-s-gi-ni-no-nv no-tsi-we-ha.

190610.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎢᎬᏩᏛᏁᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᎨᏫᏍᏗᏱ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏁᎸ ᎢᏥᎨᏳᏒ ᏕᎤᏙᎥᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏥᏍᏕᎸᎯᏙᎸ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏏᏉ ᏕᏥᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎢ.
190610.english: For God is not unrighteous to forget your work and labour of love, which ye have shewed toward his name, in that ye have ministered to the saints, and do minister.
190610.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no v-tla ni-du-yu-go-dv-na i-gv-wa-dv-ne-di yi-gi na-s-gi u-wa-ge-wi-s-di-yi de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv a-le gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-ne-lv i-tsi-ge-yu-sv de-u-do-v-i.  Na-s-gi de-tsi-s-de-lv-hi-do-lv u-na-da-nv-ti, a-le a-si-quo de-tsi-s-de-li-s-gv-i.

190611.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎣᎦᏚᎵᎭ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎬᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎢᏣᏟᏂᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎬᏂ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏫᏥᏱᎶᎸᎭ;
190611.english: And we desire that every one of you do shew the same diligence to the full assurance of hope unto the end:
190611.phonetic: A-le o-ga-du-li-ha ni-tsi-v i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv gv-li-s-qua-di-s-gi na-s-gi-ya i-ga-i i-tsa-tli-ni-gv-ne-di-yi gv-ni u-tsa-ti nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv wi-tsi-yi-lo-lv-ha;

190612.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏄᎸᏗᏉ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏗᏥᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏅᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᏄᏅᏁᎸ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ.
190612.english: That ye be not slothful, but followers of them who through faith and patience inherit the promises.
190612.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di i-tsa-da-nu-lv-di-quo yi-ge-se-s-di, di-tsi-s-da-wa-de-gi-s-gi-ni ge-se-s-di na-s-gi na u-no-hi-yu-sv a-le di-nv-ni-di-yu ge-sv a-nv-di-s-gv u-na-tse-li nu-nv-ne-lv a-du-i-s-ta-nv-i.

190613.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᏒᎲ ᎬᏩᏎᎵᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏩᏒ ᎡᎲ ᎤᏎᎵᏙᏔᏁᎢ,
190613.english: For when God made promise to Abraham, because he could swear by no greater, he sware by himself,
190613.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no E-qua-ha-mi u-du-i-s-da-ne-lv, na-s-gi gi-lo nv-wa-da-le u-tli i-ya-tsi-lv-quo-di sv-hv gv-wa-se-li-do-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-se-i, u-wa-sv e-hv u-se-li-do-ta-ne-i,

190614.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏅᏓᎬᏯᏛᏁᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏓᎬᏁᏉᎢ.
190614.english: Saying, Surely blessing I will bless thee, and multiplying I will multiply thee.
190614.phonetic: Hi-a nu-we-se-i, U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya u-tsa-ti o-s-dv nv-da-gv-ya-dv-ne-li, a-le u-tsa-ti da-gv-ne-quo-i.

190615.cherokee: ᎰᏩᏃ ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᎤᎦᏘᏛ ᎠᏥᏁᎴ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190615.english: And so, after he had patiently endured, he obtained the promise.
190615.phonetic: Ho-wa-no go-hi-di-yu u-ga-ti-dv a-tsi-ne-le a-du-i-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i.

190616.cherokee: ᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎡᎲ ᎨᎦᏎᎵᏙᏗᏍᎪᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎᎵᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ (ᎪᎱᏍᏗ) ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᏲᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏐ ᎠᎾᏗᏒᎯᎲᎢ.
190616.english: For men verily swear by the greater: and an oath for confirmation is to them an end of all strife.
190616.phonetic: Yv-wi-ye-no u-do-hi-yu-hi u-tli i-ya-tsi-lv-quo-di e-hv ge-ga-se-li-do-di-s-go-i; a-le a-se-li-ta-nv-hi ge-sv (go-hu-s-di) a-s-da-yi-di-s-do-di a-yo-hi-s-di-s-gi ge-so a-na-di-sv-hi-hv-i.

190617.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏧᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎨᏥᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏓᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᏎᎵᏛᏍᎬ ᎤᏍᏓᏱᏍᏔᏁᎢ.
190617.english: Wherein God, willing more abundantly to shew unto the heirs of promise the immutability of his counsel, confirmed it by an oath:
190617.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-du-li-s-gv u-tli i-ga-i gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsu-wa-ne-di-yi ge-tsi-du-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi na-s-gi gv-wa-da-ne-tli-yv-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv nu-s-dv a-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, a-se-li-dv-s-gv u-s-da-yi-s-ta-ne-i.

190618.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎵ ᏄᎵᏁᏨ ᏕᏛᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏓᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᎬᏩᏥᎪᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᏲᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎢᎦᏗᏍᎦᎶᏗᏱ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎢᎩᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᎩᏩᏛᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎩᏂᏴᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎡᎩᏩᏌᏓᏁᎲᎢ;
190618.english: That by two immutable things, in which it was impossible for God to lie, we might have a strong consolation, who have fled for refuge to lay hold upon the hope set before us:
190618.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi ta-li nu-li-ne-tsv de-dv-di-s-gv na-s-gi gv-wa-da-ne-tli-yv-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, na-hna gv-wa-tsi-go-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-yv i-gi-yo-lv-hi tsi-gi i-ga-di-s-ga-lo-di-yi, u-li-ni-gi-dv i-gi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-gi ge-gi-wa-dv-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi di-gi-ni-yv-di-yi u-du-gi gv-di e-gi-wa-sa-da-ne-hv-i;

190619.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎦᎾᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎡᏍᎦ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏗᏏᏴᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏩᏴᎯᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏰᏙᎳᏛ ᎤᏗᏗᏢ;
190619.english: Which hope we have as an anchor of the soul, both sure and stedfast, and which entereth into that within the veil;
190619.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv na-s-gi-ya a-da-nv-do ga-na-hi-s-do-di tsi-gi, e-s-ga ni-ga-li-s-di-s-gv-na a-le gv-di-si-yv-s-di ni-ge-sv-na, a-le na-s-gi tsi-wa-yv-hi-ha na-s-gi a-ye-do-la-dv u-di-di-tlv;

190620.cherokee: ᎾᎿᎭᏥᏌ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎡᎩ ᏫᎩᏴᏎᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎠᏥᎧᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎺᎵᎩᏏᏕᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
190620.english: Whither the forerunner is for us entered, even Jesus, made an high priest for ever after the order of Melchisedec.
190620.phonetic: Na-hna Tsi-sa i-gv-yi e-gi wi-gi-yv-se-lv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi ni-go-hi-lv a-tsi-ka-nv-hi tsi-gi, Me-li-gi-si-de-gi nu-s-dv na-s-gi-ya-i.

190701.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎹᏓᎩᏏᏕᎩ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏎᏓᎽ, ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏥᏚᏠᏎ ᏧᏨᏏᏗᏒ ᏫᏚᎰᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏧᏁᏤᎴᎢ;
190701.english: For this Melchisedec, king of Salem, priest of the most high God, who met Abraham returning from the slaughter of the kings, and blessed him;
190701.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi Ma-da-gi-si-de-gi, U-gv-wi-yu-hi Se-da-mu, a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi ge-se-i U-ne-la-nv-hi wa-s-dv ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi E-qua-ha-mi tsi-du-tlo-se tsu-tsv-si-di-sv wi-du-ho-nv-hi u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi, a-le o-s-dv tsu-ne-tse-le-i;

190702.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᏰᎲ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁ ᎪᏣᎴᏛ ᏧᏁᎸᏁᎢ; ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎨᏒ [ᏚᏙᎥ] ᎠᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎦᏛᎦ, ᎣᏂᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏎᎳᏂ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎪᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎩ ᏥᎦᏛᎦ.
190702.english: To whom also Abraham gave a tenth part of all; first being by interpretation King of righteousness, and after that also King of Salem, which is, King of peace;
190702.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi na-s-quo E-qua-ha-mi ni-ga-dv tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-ye-hv a-s-go-hi-ne go-tsa-le-dv tsu-ne-lv-ne-i; i-gv-yi-yi ge-sv [du-do-v] a-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-hi ga-dv-ga, o-ni-no na-s-quo Se-la-ni u-gv-wi-yu-hi a-go-se-ha, na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv u-du-li-s-gi tsi-ga-dv-ga.

190703.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏥ ᎾᏁᎲᎾ ᏥᎨᏎ, ᎤᎾᏁᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏂᏂᎩᏛ ᏥᎨᏎ, ᏚᎩᏨᏁᎬ ᏅᎫᏓᎴᏅᎲᎾ ᏥᎨᏎ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎲ ᏭᏍᏗᏥᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏪᏥ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᎾᎬᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏤᎭ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.
190703.english: Without father, without mother, without descent, having neither beginning of days, nor end of life; but made like unto the Son of God; abideth a priest continually.
190703.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-tse-da a-le u-tsi na-ne-hv-na tsi-ge-se, u-na-ne-tlv-ta-nv-hi a-ni-ni-gi-dv tsi-ge-se, du-gi-tsv-ne-gv nv-gu-da-le-nv-hv-na tsi-ge-se, a-le e-hv wu-s-di-tsi-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-se-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni Na-we-tsi na-s-gi-ya tsi-na-gv-ne-le-i, a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi tse-ha ni-go-hi-lv-i.

190704.cherokee: ᎡᏣᏓᏅᏛᎵᎾᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁ ᎪᏣᎴᏛ ᎤᏓᏬᏅᏛ ᎠᏰᎲ ᎤᏁᎸᎢ.
190704.english: Now consider how great this man was, unto whom even the patriarch Abraham gave the tenth of the spoils.
190704.phonetic: E-tsa-da-nv-dv-li-na-di ni-ga-v a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv hi-a na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya, na-s-gi a-ga-yv-li-ge E-qua-ha-mi u-wa-sv a-s-go-hi-ne go-tsa-le-dv u-da-wo-nv-dv a-ye-hv u-ne-lv-i.

190705.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎵᏫ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎳᏍᏗ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎨᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎨᎦᏒᎦᎸᏗᏍᎨ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁ ᎪᏣᎴᏛ ᏧᏂᏂᏢᏗᏱ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190705.english: And verily they that are of the sons of Levi, who receive the office of the priesthood, have a commandment to take tithes of the people according to the law, that is, of their brethren, though they come out of the loins of Abraham:
190705.phonetic: A-le u-do-hi-yu-hi Li-wi tsu-we-tsi a-tsi-lv-ge-la-s-di di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv ge-tsi-ne-di ge-sv-i ge-ga-sv-ga-lv-di-s-ge a-s-go-hi-ne go-tsa-le-dv tsu-ni-ni-tlv-di-yi yv-wi na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, na-s-gi a-na-li-nv-tli ge-sv-i, na-s-quo E-qua-ha-mi a-ye-li nv-da-yu-na-da-le-nv-hi ge-sv-i.

190706.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎤᎾᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎵᏫ ᎠᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᏅᏧᏓᎴᏅᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁ ᎪᏣᎴᏛ ᏚᏓᏂᎸᏤᎴ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏁᏤᎴ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏣᎦᎨᏅᏯ.
190706.english: But he whose descent is not counted from them received tithes of Abraham, and blessed him that had the promises.
190706.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na u-na-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv Li-wi a-ni-la-s-da-lv nv-tsu-da-le-nv-hv-na tsi-gi, a-s-go-hi-ne go-tsa-le-dv du-da-ni-lv-tse-le E-qua-ha-mi, a-le o-s-dv u-ne-tse-le a-du-i-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv tsa-ga-ge-nv-ya.

190707.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾ ᎡᏍᎦ ᎢᏯᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏁᏤᎰ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏥᎸᏉᏗ.
190707.english: And without all contradiction the less is blessed of the better.
190707.phonetic: A-le nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na e-s-ga i-ya-tsi-lv-quo-di ge-sv o-s-dv u-ne-tse-ho u-tli i-ya-tsi-lv-quo-di.

190708.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂ ᏴᏫ ᏗᏂᏲᎱᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁ ᎪᏣᎴᏛ ᎢᎨᏥᏁᎰᎢ; ᎾᎿᎭᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎩᏎᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᎭ ᎠᎪᏎᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ.
190708.english: And here men that die receive tithes; but there he receiveth them, of whom it is witnessed that he liveth.
190708.phonetic: A-le a-ni yv-wi di-ni-yo-hu-s-gi tsi-gi a-s-go-hi-ne go-tsa-le-dv i-ge-tsi-ne-ho-i; na-hna-s-gi-ni u-gi-se-i na-s-gi na e-ha a-go-se-lv-hi tsi-gi.

190709.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠᏉ ᏱᎾᎩᏪᏒ, ᎵᏫ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁ ᎪᏣᎴᏛ ᏗᏓᏂᎸᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁ ᎪᏣᎴᏛ ᎤᎫᏴᎮ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᎫᏴᎲ.
190709.english: And as I may so say, Levi also, who receiveth tithes, payed tithes in Abraham.
190709.phonetic: A-le hi-a-quo yi-na-gi-we-sv, Li-wi na-s-quo a-s-go-hi-ne go-tsa-le-dv di-da-ni-lv-gi tsi-gi, a-s-go-hi-ne go-tsa-le-dv u-gu-yv-he na-hi-yu E-qua-ha-mi u-gu-yv-hv.

190710.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏉᏰᏃ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎠᏯᎡᎢ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎹᎵᎩᏏᏕᎩ ᏥᏚᏠᏍᎨᎢ.
190710.english: For he was yet in the loins of his father, when Melchisedec met him.
190710.phonetic: A-si-quo-ye-no u-do-da a-ye-lv a-ya-e-i na-hi-yu Ma-li-gi-si-de-gi tsi-du-tlo-s-ge-i.

190711.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎳᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂᎵᏫ ᏥᎨᎦᏒᎦᎶᏕ, ᏅᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎢᎬᏩᏓᏛᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, (ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎳᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏚᎾᏚᏓᏖ ᏴᏫ ᎦᎾᏓᏂᎸᏨ) ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏏ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎶᎯ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎹᎵᎩᏏᏕᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎡᎳᏂᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᏰᎪᏎᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ?
190711.english: If therefore perfection were by the Levitical priesthood, (for under it the people received the law,) what further need was there that another priest should rise after the order of Melchisedec, and not be called after the order of Aaron?
190711.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no a-tsi-lv-ge-la-s-di ge-sv A-ni-li-wi tsi-ge-ga-sv-ga-lo-de, nv-s-ga-nv-na i-gv-wa-da-dv-ne-di yi-ge-se-i, (a-tsi-lv--ge-la-s-di-ye-no ge-sv a-le di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di du-na-du-da-te yv-wi ga-na-da-ni-lv-tsv) ga-do-no a-si u-du-lv-di ni-ga-li-s-di-s-ge nv-wa-da-le a-tsi-lv-ge-lo-hi u-na-nu-go-i-s-di-yi Ma-li-gi-si-de-gi nu-s-dv na-s-gi-ya-i, E-la-ni-no na-s-gi-ya ga-ye-go-se-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i?

190712.cherokee: ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎳᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏓᏁᏟᏴᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏎ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᏁᏟᏴᏛ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ.
190712.english: For the priesthood being changed, there is made of necessity a change also of the law.
190712.phonetic: A-tsi-lv--ge-la-s-di-ye-no ge-sv u-da-ne-tli-yv-dv ge-sv-i, a-se na-s-quo ga-ne-tli-yv-dv ni-ga-li-s-di-ha di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di.

190713.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ Ꮎ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎠᏥᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᎠᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᎨᎳ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ [ᎠᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ] ᎤᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ ᏱᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᎢ.
190713.english: For he of whom these things are spoken pertaineth to another tribe, of which no man gave attendance at the altar.
190713.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no na hi-a na-s-gi u-gv-wa-li a-tsi-ne-i-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv u-tsa-ti-ni a-ni-la-s-da-lv ge-la ge-sv-gi, na-s-gi [a-ni-la-s-da-lv] u-da-le-nv-hi v-tla gi-lo a-tsi-lv-ge-la-s-di-yi yi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-i.

190714.cherokee: ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᏓ ᎠᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᎲᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᎼᏏ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏚᏁᎢᏍᏔᏁ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎳᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
190714.english: For it is evident that our Lord sprang out of Juda; of which tribe Moses spake nothing concerning priesthood.
190714.phonetic: Gv-ni-ge-sv-i-yu-ye-no ni-ga-li-s-di-ha na-s-gi i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsu-da a-ni-la-s-da-lv tsu-da-le-nv-hv-i; na-s-gi a-ni-la-s-da-lv Mo-si v-tla yi-du-ne-i-s-ta-ne a-tsi-lv--ge-la-s-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li.

190715.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏏ ᎤᏟ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎺᎵᎩᏏᏕᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏱᎦᎾᏄᎪᎦ,
190715.english: And it is yet far more evident: for that after the similitude of Melchisedec there ariseth another priest,
190715.phonetic: A-le a-si u-tli gv-ni-ge-sv ni-ga-li-s-di-ha, i-yu-no Me-li-gi-si-de-gi nu-s-dv na-s-gi-ya nv-wa-da-le a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi yi-ga-na-nu-go-ga,

190716.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᎩ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎾᎬᏁᎸ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᎬᏁᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎬᏂᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
190716.english: Who is made, not after the law of a carnal commandment, but after the power of an endless life.
190716.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-tsi-gi--ge-lo-hi na-gv-ne-lv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-que-da-li u-gv-wa-li na-s-gi-ya na-gv-ne-lv-na ge-sv-i, gv-ni-dv-s-gi-ni a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na u-li-ni-gv-gv na-s-gi-ya-i.

190717.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ, ᎠᏥᎸᎮᎶᎯ ᎨᎭ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ ᎺᎵᎩᏏᏕᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
190717.english: For he testifieth, Thou art a priest for ever after the order of Melchisedec.
190717.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-ga-we-ha ka-ne-gv-i, A-tsi-lv-he-lo-hi ge-ha ni-go-hi-lv-i Me-li-gi-si-de-gi nu-s-dv na-s-gi-ya-i.

190718.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎤᎵᏁᏨᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎠᏩᏂᎦᎳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᏓᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
190718.english: For there is verily a disannulling of the commandment going before for the weakness and unprofitableness thereof.
190718.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ye-no i-yv-dv i-gv-ne-lv-hi ni-ga-li-s-di-ha i-gv-yi-yi u-li-ne-tsv-hi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, a-wa-ni-ga-la-hi-yu ge-sv a-le gv-wa-da-s-de-lv-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di.

190719.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎦᎷᎶᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ; ᎤᏟᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏝᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏴᏔᏂᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏛᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᎥ ᎦᏰᏗᎷᏤᏗ ᏥᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᎷᎶᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏂᎬᏁᎭ.
190719.english: For the law made nothing perfect, but the bringing in of a better hope did; by the which we draw nigh unto God.
190719.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no v-tla ga-lu-lo-gi ni-ge-sv-na i-gv-ne-hi yi-ge-se go-hu-s-di; u-tli-s-gi-ni i-tla-s-dv u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv a-yv-ta-ni-lv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi i-dv-di-s-gv na-v ga-ye-di-lu-tse-di tsi-ni-ga-li-s-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi ga-lu-lo-gi ni-ge-sv-na ni-gv-ne-ha.

190720.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎᎵᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ [ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ,]
190720.english: And inasmuch as not without an oath he was made priest:
190720.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi a-se-li-ta-nv-hi ge-sv gv-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi [Ga-lo-ne-dv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi i-ya-gv-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi,]

190721.cherokee: (ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ Ꮎ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᏂᎨᎬᏁᎮ ᎠᏎᎵᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ; ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎠᏎᎵᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎬᏓᏁᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏪᏎᎸᎯ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏎᎵᏔᏅ ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎠᎦᏁᏟᏴᎾ ᏂᎯ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎮᎶᎯ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ ᎺᎵᎩᏏᏕᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.)
190721.english: (For those priests were made without an oath; but this with an oath by him that said unto him, The Lord sware and will not repent, Thou art a priest for ever after the order of Melchisedec:)
190721.phonetic: (Na-s-gi-ye-no na a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi ni-ge-gv-ne-he a-se-li-ta-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na; hi-a-s-gi-ni na a-se-li-ta-nv-hi ge-sv a-gv-da-ne-le-i, hi-a na-s-gi i-yu-we-se-lv-hi, U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-se-li-ta-nv a-le v-tla a-ga-ne-tli-yv-na ni-hi a-tsi-lv--he-lo-hi ni-go-hi-lv-i Me-li-gi-si-de-gi nu-s-dv na-s-gi-ya-i.)

190722.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏗ ᏔᎵ ᎠᏛᏗᏍᎩ ᏫᎬᏁᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ.
190722.english: By so much was Jesus made a surety of a better testament.
190722.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya i-yv-dv u-lo-sv-s-di ta-li a-dv-di-s-gi wi-gv-ne-le Tsi-sa ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i.

190723.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎤᏂᏣᏛᎩ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎪᎯᏛ ᎬᏩᎾᏕᏗ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
190723.english: And they truly were many priests, because they were not suffered to continue by reason of death:
190723.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi na hi-a a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi u-ni-tsa-dv-gi, v-tla-ye-no go-hi-dv gv-wa-na-de-di yi-ge-se a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv i-yu-s-di.

190724.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ [ᎠᏍᎦᏯ] ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏤᎭ ᎤᎶᏏᎲᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190724.english: But this man, because he continueth ever, hath an unchangeable priesthood.
190724.phonetic: Hi-a-s-gi-ni [a-s-ga-ya] a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na tse-ha u-lo-si-hv-s-di ni-ge-sv-na a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi ge-sv-i.

190725.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎬᏩᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎬᏩᎷᎯᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏂᎷᏤᎲᎢ, ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾᏰᏃ ᎡᎭ ᏧᎵᏍᏗᏰᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
190725.english: Wherefore he is able also to save them to the uttermost that come unto God by him, seeing he ever liveth to make intercession for them.
190725.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-go-hi-lv ye-li-quo na-s-quo di-gv-wa-s-de-lv-di na-s-gi na u-wa-sv gv-wa-lu-hi-s-da-ne-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ni-lu-tse-hv-i, wi-na-s-dv-na-ye-no e-ha tsu-li-s-di-ye-da-ne-di-yi.

190726.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎢᎩᎵᎶᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ, ᎤᏲ ᎢᎬᏩᏓᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᏄᏓᏅᎦᎸᎾ, ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎠᎦᏓᏓᎴᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᎶ ᎤᏗᏗᏢ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎠᏥᏌᎳᏓᏅᎯ;
190726.english: For such an high priest became us, who is holy, harmless, undefiled, separate from sinners, and made higher than the heavens;
190726.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no i-yu-s-di a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi i-gi-li-lo-hv-s-gi ge-sv-gi, na-s-gi na-s-ga-nv-na, u-yo i-gv-wa-da-dv-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na, a-s-ga-na nu-da-nv-ga-lv-na, a-ni-s-ga-na a-ne-hv a-ga-da-da-le-ta-nv-hi, a-le ga-lv-lo u-di-di-tlv i-yv-dv a-tsi-sa-la-da-nv-hi;

190727.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏓᏁᎲᎾ ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎤᏪᎳᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎠᏥᎸᎠᏁᎶᎯ, ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᏗ, ᎢᏉᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏌᏉ ᏄᏛᏁᎴᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏓᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅ.
190727.english: Who needeth not daily, as those high priests, to offer up sacrifice, first for his own sins, and then for the people's: for this he did once, when he offered up himself.
190727.phonetic: Na-s-gi na u-du-lv-di nu-li-s-da-ne-hv-na ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv a-tsi-lv--u-we-la-s-di-yi, na-s-gi na-na-dv-ne-hv nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi a-tsi-lv-a-ne-lo-hi, i-gv-yi u-nv-sv u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv a-gu-yv-do-di, i-quo-no yv-wi u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv a-gu-yv-do-di; na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a sa-quo nu-dv-ne-le-i, na-hi-yu u-wa-sv u-da-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv.

190728.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏗᏂᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᏄᏅᏁᎰᎢ; ᎧᏁᏨᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏎᎵᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏁᏨ ᎣᏂ ᏧᎵᏁᏤᎢ, ᎤᏪᏥ [ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎶᎯ] ᏄᏩᏁᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎦᎷᎶᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ.
190728.english: For the law maketh men high priests which have infirmity; but the word of the oath, which was since the law, maketh the Son, who is consecrated for evermore.
190728.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-ye-no yv-wi di-ni-wa-na-ga-la nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi nu-nv-ne-ho-i; ka-ne-tsv-hi-s-gi-ni a-se-li-ta-nv-hi a-s-da-yi-di-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-li-ne-tsv o-ni tsu-li-ne-tse-i, u-we-tsi [a-tsi-lv-ge-lo-hi] nu-wa-ne-le na-s-gi ni-go-hi-lv ga-lu-lo-gi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi.

190801.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏗᏃᎮᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮀ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᎩᎧᎭ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎦᏍᎩᎸ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎤᏪᏅ;
190801.english: Now of the things which we have spoken this is the sum: We have such an high priest, who is set on the right hand of the throne of the Majesty in the heavens;
190801.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a tsi-di-no-he-ha, hi-a na-s-gi ho nu-gv-wi-yu-sv ni-ga-li-s-di-ha; na-s-gi nu-s-di i-gi-ka-ha nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi, na-s-gi a-ga-ti-si-di-tlv Ga-lv-quo-di-yu ga-s-gi-lv ga-lv-lo-i u-we-nv;

190802.cherokee: ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏗᎦᎵᏦᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᎵᏦᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏴᏫ.
190802.english: A minister of the sanctuary, and of the true tabernacle, which the Lord pitched, and not man.
190802.phonetic: Tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi ga-lv-quo-di-yu di-ge-sv-i a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi di-ga-li-tso-dv-i, na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-li-tso-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i, v-tla-no yv-wi.

190803.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏰᏃ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎨᏥᏁᏤᎸᎯ ᎨᏐ ᏧᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᏗᎨᎳᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏎ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏲᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗ.
190803.english: For every high priest is ordained to offer gifts and sacrifices: wherefore it is of necessity that this man have somewhat also to offer.
190803.phonetic: Na-ni-v-ye-no nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi ge-tsi-ne-tse-lv-hi ge-so tsu-na-li-s-go-lv-do-di-yi a-da-ne-di ge-sv a-le a-tsi-lv--di-ge-la-s-do-di ge-sv-i; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya na-s-quo a-se go-hu-s-di u-yo-hi-s-di ge-se u-li-s-go-lv-do-di.

190804.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏱᎦᏰᎮᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎶᎯ ᏱᎦᎨᏎᎢ, ᎢᎠᏁᎭᏰᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏗᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ;
190804.english: For if he were on earth, he should not be a priest, seeing that there are priests that offer gifts according to the law:
190804.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no e-lo-hi yi-ga-ye-he-i, v-tla a-tsi-lv-ge-lo-hi yi-ga-ge-se-i, i-a-ne-ha-ye-no a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-da-ne-di ge-sv a-na-li-s-go-lv-di-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-gv-nv na-s-gi-ya-i;

190805.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿ ᎭᏥᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏩᏗᏍᏙᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎦᎵᏦᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᎼᏏ ᏧᏁᏤᎴ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎵᏦᏙᏗ ᏨᏗᎪᏢᏂᏎᎢ; ᎭᎦᏌᏯᏍᏔᏅᎭ ᏧᏛᏁᎢ, ᏕᎰᏢᏍᎬ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᏣᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸ ᎣᏓᎸ ᏅᏁᎸᎭ.
190805.english: Who serve unto the example and shadow of heavenly things, as Moses was admonished of God when he was about to make the tabernacle: for, See, saith he, that thou make all things according to the pattern shewed to thee in the mount.
190805.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-hna tsi-du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha di-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi a-le u-da-wa-di-s-do-dv ga-lv-la-di e-hi ga-li-tso-dv-i, na-s-gi-ya [U-ne-la-nv-hi] Mo-si tsu-ne-tse-le na-hi-yu ga-li-tso-do-di tsv-di-go-tlv-ni-se-i; ha-ga-sa-ya-s-ta-nv-ha tsu-dv-ne-i, De-ho-tlv-s-gv ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv na-s-gi-ya di-tli-lo-s-do-di a-hv na-s-gi tse-tsa-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv o-da-lv nv-ne-lv-ha.

190806.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏩᏛᎲ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᎴᎲᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏲᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏲᏍᏛ ᏓᏚᎢᏍᏛ ᏧᎵᏍᏓᏱᏍᏗ.
190806.english: But now hath he obtained a more excellent ministry, by how much also he is the mediator of a better covenant, which was established upon better promises.
190806.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di go-hi ge-sv u-tli i-ga-lv-quo-di di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv u-wa-dv-hv, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-ye-li a-le-hv-s-gi ge-sv u-tli i-yo-s-dv ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv u-gv-wa-lv-i, na-s-gi u-tli i-yo-s-dv da-du-i-s-dv tsu-li-s-da-yi-s-di.

190807.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᎦᎫᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏗᏠᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏱᎬᏩᏂᏔᏲᎴᎢ.
190807.english: For if that first covenant had been faultless, then should no place have been sought for the second.
190807.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no i-gv-yi-yi ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv ga-gu-hi-s-do-di ni-ge-sv-na yi-ge-se-i, v-tla nv-wa-da-le ka-no-he-dv di-tlo-hi-s-do-di-yi yi-gv-wa-ni-ta-yo-le-i.

190808.cherokee: ᎡᏍᎦᏰᏃ ᎤᏰᎸᏅ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯ, ᎠᏗᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏗᎦᏥᏯᏠᎢᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏏᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏓ ᏏᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190808.english: For finding fault with them, he saith, Behold, the days come, saith the Lord, when I will make a new covenant with the house of Israel and with the house of Judah:
190808.phonetic: E-s-ga-ye-no u-ye-lv-nv hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Gv-ni-yu-quo, dv-s-qua-lv-hi, a-di-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi, na-s-gi i-tse ka-no-he-dv di-ga-tsi-ya-tlo-i-s-da-ne-di-yi I-si-li si-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv a-le Tsu-da si-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

190809.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏕᎦᏥᏯᏠᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏧᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᏂᏲᏯᏁᏒ ᎦᏥᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏈᏱ ᎦᏓ ᎠᎲᎢ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏳᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏁ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏕᎦᏥᏯᏠᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᏥᏯᎦᏌᏯᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᏗᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
190809.english: Not according to the covenant that I made with their fathers in the day when I took them by the hand to lead them out of the land of Egypt; because they continued not in my covenant, and I regarded them not, saith the Lord.
190809.phonetic: V-tla na-s-gi-ya ka-no-he-dv de-ga-tsi-ya-tlo-i-s-da-ne-lv tsu-ni-ga-yv-li-ge-i, na-hi-yu ga-ni-yo-ya-ne-sv ga-tsi-nu-go-wi-s-di-yi I-tsi-qui-yi ga-da a-hv-i; v-tla-ye-no yu-ni-s-qua-ni-go-ta-ne ka-no-he-dv de-ga-tsi-ya-tlo-i-s-da-ne-lv-i, a-le a-yv v-tla yi-ga-tsi-ya-ga-sa-ya-s-ta-ne-i, a-di-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi.

190810.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏙᏓᎦᏥᏯᏠᎢᏍᏓᏁᎵ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏏᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎶᏐᏅᎭ ᎠᏗᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ; ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᏓᏓᏥᎳᏂ ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᎾᏫᏱ ᏙᏓᎪᏪᎳᏂ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎦᏥᏯᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏅᏒᏃ ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ;
190810.english: For this is the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel after those days, saith the Lord; I will put my laws into their mind, and write them in their hearts: and I will be to them a God, and they shall be to me a people:
190810.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi nu-s-de-s-di ka-no-he-dv do-da-ga-tsi-ya-tlo-i-s-da-ne-li I-si-li si-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv na-hi-yu ga-lo-so-nv-ha a-di-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi; du-na-da-nv-dv da-da-tsi-la-ni di-qua-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, a-le tsu-ni-na-wi-yi do-da-go-we-la-ni; A-le a-yv Ga-tsi-ya-ne-la-nv-hi ge-se-s-di, u-nv-sv-no di-qua-tse-li yv-wi ge-se-s-di;

190811.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏧᎾᏓᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎨᏒ ᏱᎨᏲᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᎦᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎯᎦᏙᎥᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ; ᎾᏂᎥᏉᏰᏃ ᎬᎩᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᎡᎲ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎡᎲ ᏫᎬᏍᏗ.
190811.english: And they shall not teach every man his neighbour, and every man his brother, saying, Know the Lord: for all shall know me, from the least to the greatest.
190811.phonetic: V-tla a-le gi-lo a-si-yv-wi ge-sv na-v i-tsu-na-da-li, a-le di-na-da-nv-tli ge-sv yi-ge-yo-hv-s-ge-s-di, hi-a yi-ni-ga-we-s-ge-s-di, Hi-ga-do-v-hi U-gv-wi-yu-hi; na-ni-v-quo-ye-no gv-gi-ga-ta-hi-yu ge-se-s-di, u-s-di-ka-ni e-hv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv, u-tli i-ya-tsi-lv-quo-di e-hv wi-gv-s-di.

190812.cherokee: ᏓᎦᏥᏯᏙᎵᏥᏰᏃ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸᎢ, ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎵᏙᎸ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏆᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
190812.english: For I will be merciful to their unrighteousness, and their sins and their iniquities will I remember no more.
190812.phonetic: Da-ga-tsi-ya-do-li-tsi-ye-no u-tsa-ti-ni nu-na-dv-ne-lv-i, u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-no a-le u-yo nu-na-dv-ne-li-do-lv v-tla hna-quo a-qua-nv-da-di-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

190813.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏤ ᏥᎪᏎᎭ, ᏐᎢ ᎤᏪᏘ ᏂᎬᏁᎭ.  ᎪᎱᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᏘ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏔᏨᎯ ᏥᎨᏐ, ᎤᏲᏥᏕᏅ ᎨᏐᎢ.
190813.english: In that he saith, A new covenant, he hath made the first old. Now that which decayeth and waxeth old is ready to vanish away.
190813.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no sa-quo i-tse tsi-go-se-ha, so-i u-we-ti ni-gv-ne-ha.  Go-hu-s-di-ye-no u-we-ti i-gv-ne-lv-hi a-le u-we-ta-tsv-hi tsi-ge-so, u-yo-tsi-de-nv ge-so-i.

190901.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏕᎪᏢᏒᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎦᎵᏦᏛᎢ.
190901.english: Then verily the first covenant had also ordinances of divine service, and a worldly sanctuary.
190901.phonetic: A-le-wo u-do-hi-yu-hi i-gv-yi-yi ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di de-go-tlv-sv-gi u-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di u-gv-wa-li, a-le e-lo-hi e-hi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ga-li-tso-dv-i.

190902.cherokee: ᎦᎵᏦᏙᏗᏰᏃ ᎤᏃᏢᏁᎢ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏣᏃᏎᎮᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᏓᏓᎯᏛᎢ, ᏥᎦᎧᎮ ᎠᏨᏍᏙᏗ ᎦᎪᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏍᎩᎶᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᏣᏝᎮ ᎠᎦᏙᏗ ᎦᏚ;
190902.english: For there was a tabernacle made; the first, wherein was the candlestick, and the table, and the shewbread; which is called the sanctuary.
190902.phonetic: Ga-li-tso-do-di-ye-no u-no-tlv-ne-i, ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv tsa-no-se-he-i, na-hna i-gv-yi-yi da-da-hi-dv-i, tsi-ga-ka-he a-tsv-s-do-di ga-go-di-yi, a-le ga-s-gi-lo-i, a-le na-hna tsa-tla-he a-ga-do-di ga-du;

190903.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎠᏰᏙᎳᏛ ᎤᏗᏗᏢ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎵᏦᏛᎢ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏣᏃᏎᎮᎢ;
190903.english: And after the second veil, the tabernacle which is called the Holiest of all;
190903.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no a-ye-do-la-dv u-di-di-tlv hi-a na-s-gi ga-li-tso-dv-i u-tli i-ga-lv-quo-di tsa-no-se-he-i;

190904.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏣᎮ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᎠᏥᎸᎨᎳᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᏥᏥᏰ ᎦᏁᏌᎢ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏗᎦᎶᏗᏱ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎫᏢᏔᏃᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᏥᎦᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏖᎵᏙ ᎹᎾ ᏥᎦᎶᏕᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎳᏂ ᎤᏙᎳᏅᏍᏙᏗ ᏣᏥᎸᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏯ ᏗᏯᏖᏅ ᎾᎿᎭᏥᎪᏪᎴ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ.
190904.english: Which had the golden censer, and the ark of the covenant overlaid round about with gold, wherein was the golden pot that had manna, and Aaron's rod that budded, and the tables of the covenant;
190904.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-hna tsa-he go-hu-s-di gv-do-di a-de-lv--da-lo-ni-ge go-tlv-ta-nv-hi ga-wa-sv-gi a-tsi-lv-ge-la-s-di ga-lo-di, a-le na-hna tsi-tsi-ye ga-ne-sa-i di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di di-ga-lo-di-yi a-de-lv--da-lo-ni-ge gu-tlv-ta-no-nv-hi tsi-ge-se-i, na-hna-ni tsi-ga-le a-de-lv--da-lo-ni-ge go-tlv-ta-nv-hi a-te-li-do ma-na tsi-ga-lo-de-i, a-le E-la-ni u-do-la-nv-s-do-di tsa-tsi-lv-s-ge-i, a-le nv-ya di-ya-te-nv na-hna tsi-go-we-le ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i.

190905.cherokee: ᎠᎴ [ᎦᏁᏌᎢ] ᏥᏴ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏢ ᎠᏂᎩᎷᏫ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏯᏅᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏄᏢᏕ ᎦᏁᏌᎢ ᎫᏢᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎦᏁᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ.
190905.english: And over it the cherubims of glory shadowing the mercyseat; of which we cannot now speak particularly.
190905.phonetic: A-le [ga-ne-sa-i] tsi-yv ga-lv-la-di-tlv a-ni-gi-lu-wi ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-ya-nv-ne-hi, na-s-gi tsu-nu-tlv-de ga-ne-sa-i gu-tlv-di; na-s-gi u-gv-wa-li v-tla go-hi ge-sv ni-ga-dv ga-ne-i-s-do-di yi-gi.

190906.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᎬᏁᎰᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏩᏂᏴᎯᎮ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᏓᏓᎯᏢ ᎦᎵᏦᏛᎢ, ᏫᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
190906.english: Now when these things were thus ordained, the priests went always into the first tabernacle, accomplishing the service of God.
190906.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi o-s-dv i-gv-ne-ho-nv-hi ge-se-i, a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi ni-go-hi-lv wa-ni-yv-hi-he i-gv-yi-yi da-da-hi-tlv ga-li-tso-dv-i, wi-du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he [U-ne-la-nv-hi] u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li.

190907.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏍᎩᏂ ᏫᎦᎵᏦᏛ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏌᏉ ᏫᎾᏴᎯᎮ ᏂᏓᏕᏘᏴᎯᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎬ ᏂᎦᏁᏤᎲᎾ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᏗ.
190907.english: But into the second went the high priest alone once every year, not without blood, which he offered for himself, and for the errors of the people:
190907.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-s-gi-ni wi-ga-li-tso-dv nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi u-wa-sv sa-quo wi-na-yv-hi-he ni-da-de-ti-yv-hi-sv-i, v-tla a-le gi-gv ni-ga-ne-tse-hv-na yi-ge-se-i, na-s-gi u-wa-sv u-s-ga-nv-tsv a-gu-yv-do-di, a-le u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv a-gu-yv-do-di.

190908.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏕ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎬᏁᎮᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏫᎦᏅᏅ ᎠᏏ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᏥᏂᎬᏩᏍᏕ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎦᎵᏦᏛᎢ;
190908.english: The Holy Ghost this signifying, that the way into the holiest of all was not yet made manifest, while as the first tabernacle was yet standing:
190908.phonetic: Na-s-gi Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do hi-a nu-s-de gv-ni-ge-sv ni-gv-ne-he-i, na-s-gi na u-tli i-ga-lv-quo-di di-ge-sv wi-ga-nv-nv a-si gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, a-si-quo tsi-ni-gv-wa-s-de i-gv-yi-yi ga-li-tso-dv-i;

190909.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎵᏦᏛ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯᏉ ᏥᎨᏎ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᏥᏓᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏗᏍᎨ ᎠᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎳᏍᏙᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᏰᎵ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎢᎬᏩᏁᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏎ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ;
190909.english: Which was a figure for the time then present, in which were offered both gifts and sacrifices, that could not make him that did the service perfect, as pertaining to the conscience;
190909.phonetic: na-s-gi ga-li-tso-dv di-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi-quo tsi-ge-se na-hi-yu ge-sv-i, na-hna-ni tsi-da-na-li-s-go-lv-di-s-ge a-da-ne-di ge-sv a-le na-s-quo a-tsi-lv--ge-la-s-do-di, na-s-gi na i-yu-dv-ne-lv-hi ye-li na-s-ga-nv-na i-gv-wa-ne-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-se a-da-nv-do u-gv-wa-li ge-sv-i;

190910.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗᏱᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎪᏑᎴᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎬᏩᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᏥᏂᎨᎬᏁᎴ ᎤᏓᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ.
190910.english: Which stood only in meats and drinks, and divers washings, and carnal ordinances, imposed on them until the time of reformation.
190910.phonetic: Na-s-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi-quo ge-sv a-le a-di-ta-s-di-yi-quo ge-sv a-le di-go-su-le-di-yi ge-sv-i, a-le di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di u-que-da-li-quo ge-sv tsu-gv-wa-le-i, na-s-gi i-yu-na-dv-ne-di tsi-ni-ge-gv-ne-le u-da-ne-tli-yv-s-di ge-sv u-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di ge-sv i-go-hi-dv.

190911.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎷᏨᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᎢᏟ ᎢᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎷᎶᏥᏙᎲᎾ ᎦᎵᏦᏛᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᏧᏬᏰᏂ ᏧᏮᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᏬᏢᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏯᏛᏅ, ᎠᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ,
190911.english: But Christ being come an high priest of good things to come, by a greater and more perfect tabernacle, not made with hands, that is to say, not of this building;
190911.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-s-gi-ni u-lu-tsv-hi tsi-gi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi i-yu-li-s-ta-nv-hi tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi o-s-dv ge-sv u-gv-wa-li u-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di tsi-ge-sv-gi, na-s-gi gv-di-s-gv i-tli i-ga-lv-quo-di a-le ni-ga-lu-lo-tsi-do-hv-na ga-li-tso-dv-i, gi-lo tsu-wo-ye-ni tsu-wv-ta-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na u-wo-tlv-nv-hi, na-s-gi ya-dv-nv, a-ne-la-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i,

190912.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᏗᏂᎭᏄᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏩᎦ ᎠᏂᎩᎾ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᏩᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎩᎬ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᏌᏉ ᏄᏴᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᏗ ᎢᎩᏩᏛᎡᎸ.
190912.english: Neither by the blood of goats and calves, but by his own blood he entered in once into the holy place, having obtained eternal redemption for us.
190912.phonetic: V-tla a-le yv-wi di-ni-ha-nu-lv-hi a-le wa-ga a-ni-gi-na u-ni-gi-gv gv-di-s-gv-i, u-wa-sv-s-gi-ni u-gi-gv gv-di-s-gv-i, sa-quo nu-yv-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu di-ge-sv-i, hna-quo na-s-gi wi-na-s-dv-na a-gu-yv-do-di i-gi-wa-dv-e-lv.

190913.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏩᎦ ᏧᎾᎪᏅᏍᏓᎵ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏫ ᏗᏂᎭᏄᎸᎯ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ, ᎠᎴ ᏩᎦ ᎠᎩᏏ ᎤᎪᏅᎯ ᎪᏍᏚ ᏕᎨᏥᏆᏲᎥᏍᎬ ᎠᏂᎦᏓᎭ, ᎾᏂᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎢᎬᏩᏅᏁᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎸ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ.
190913.english: For if the blood of bulls and of goats, and the ashes of an heifer sprinkling the unclean, sanctifieth to the purifying of the flesh:
190913.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no wa-ga tsu-na-go-nv-s-da-li u-ni-gi-gv, a-le a-wi di-ni-ha-nu-lv-hi u-ni-gi-gv, a-le wa-ga a-gi-si u-go-nv-hi go-s-du de-ge-tsi-qua-yo-v-s-gv a-ni-ga-da-ha, na-ni-s-ga-nv-na i-gv-wa-nv-ne-di yi-gi na-s-gi u-ni-que-da-lv u-gv-wa-li ge-sv-i.

190914.cherokee: ᎢᎳᎪ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎩᎬ, ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᏙᏓᏥᏅᎦᎸᎡᎵ ᏙᏓᏥᎧᎲᏏ ᎠᏓᎯᎯ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᎬᏂᏛᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏤᏣᏁᎶᏙᏗᏱ ᏅᏓᏨᏁᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎡᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏄᏓᏅᎦᎸᎾ [ᎠᏍᎦᎾ,] ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏓᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ?
190914.english: How much more shall the blood of Christ, who through the eternal Spirit offered himself without spot to God, purge your conscience from dead works to serve the living God?
190914.phonetic: I-la-go i-yv-dv i-ga-i u-tli-hi-yu Ga-lo-ne-dv u-gi-gv, di-tsa-da-nv-do do-da-tsi-nv-ga-lv-e-li do-da-tsi-ka-hv-si a-da-hi-hi de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, gv-ni-dv-no U-ne-la-nv-hi tse-tsa-ne-lo-do-di-yi nv-da-tsv-ne-li na-s-gi wi-na-s-dv-na e-hi A-da-nv-do gv-di-s-gv nu-da-nv-ga-lv-na [a-s-ga-na,] Ga-lo-ne-dv u-wa-sv u-da-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi?

190915.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᎴᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎢᏤ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏗᎬᏭᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏓᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᎤᏂᏲᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎤᎾᏘᏯᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
190915.english: And for this cause he is the mediator of the new testament, that by means of death, for the redemption of the transgressions that were under the first testament, they which are called might receive the promise of eternal inheritance.
190915.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-ye-li a-le-hv-s-gi ni-ga-li-s-di-ha i-tse ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i, na-s-gi u-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-sv gv-di-s-gv di-gv-wu-da-le-s-di i-yu-da-s-do-di-yi i-gv-yi-yi ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv u-ni-yo-s-ta-nv-i, na-s-gi ge-tsi-ya-nv-dv tsi-gi u-na-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-du-i-s-dv wi-na-s-dv-na u-na-ti-ya-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i;

190916.cherokee: ᎧᏃᎮᏛᏰᏃ ᏗᏠᎯᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ, ᎠᏎ ᎠᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏐ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ.
190916.english: For where a testament is, there must also of necessity be the death of the testator.
190916.phonetic: Ka-no-he-dv-ye-no di-tlo-hi-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-ge-so-i, a-se a-hi-s-di ge-so a-s-da-yi-di-s-gi ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i.

190917.cherokee: ᎧᏃᎮᏛᏰᏃ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎨᏐ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎸᎯ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏛᎯ ᏱᎨᏐ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗ ᎠᏏᏉ ᏥᎬᏃᎢ.
190917.english: For a testament is of force after men are dead: otherwise it is of no strength at all while the testator liveth.
190917.phonetic: Ka-no-he-dv-ye-no da-tlo-hi-s-dv a-s-da-yi-yu ge-so a-li-s-go-lv-do-di ge-sv a-lv-hi tsi-ge-so-i; v-tla a-le a-s-da-yi-dv-hi yi-ge-so a-li-s-go-lv-do-di a-si-quo tsi-gv-no-i.

190918.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏗᏠᎯᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏛᎯ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎩᎬ ᎬᏔᏅᎾ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ.
190918.english: Whereupon neither the first testament was dedicated without blood.
190918.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-gv-yi-yi ka-no-he-dv di-tlo-hi-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv v-tla a-s-da-yi-dv-hi yi-ge-se gi-gv gv-ta-nv-na ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi.

190919.cherokee: ᎼᏏᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᏚᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᏩᎦ ᎠᏂᎩᎾ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏫ ᏗᏂᎭᏄᎸᎯ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ ᎤᏁᎩᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎹ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏩᏅ ᎩᎦᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏐᏈ, ᏚᏍᏚᏞᏃ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ.
190919.english: For when Moses had spoken every precept to all the people according to the law, he took the blood of calves and of goats, with water, and scarlet wool, and hyssop, and sprinkled both the book, and all the people,
190919.phonetic: Mo-si-ye-no ni-ga-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv du-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv yv-wi na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, wa-ga a-ni-gi-na u-ni-gi-gv a-le a-wi di-ni-ha-nu-lv-hi u-ni-gi-gv u-ne-gi-se-i, a-le a-ma a-le u-wa-nv gi-ga-ge-i, a-le di-so-qui, du-s-du-tle-no go-we-li a-le na-ni-v yv-wi.

190920.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎬ, ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᏥᏁᏤ ᏗᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ.
190920.english: Saying, This is the blood of the testament which God hath enjoined unto you.
190920.phonetic: Hi-a ni-we-s-ge-i, hi-a na-s-gi gi-gv, ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv a-s-da-yi-di-s-gi na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-tsi-ne-tse di-tsi-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi.

190921.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎩᎬ ᏚᏍᏚᏟᏍᏔᏁ ᎦᎵᏦᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏗᎬᏔᏂᏓᏍᏗ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
190921.english: Moreover he sprinkled with blood both the tabernacle, and all the vessels of the ministry.
190921.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo gi-gv du-s-du-tli-s-ta-ne ga-li-tso-dv-i, a-le ni-ga-dv go-hu-s-di di-gv-ta-ni-da-s-di du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

190922.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎩᎬ ᎦᏅᎦᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎬ ᎠᏨᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎦᏴᏓᏗᏙᎵᎩ.
190922.english: And almost all things are by the law purged with blood; and without shedding of blood is no remission.
190922.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-v-quo i-yu-s-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-gv-nv gi-gv ga-nv-ga-lv-do-di ge-sv-gi; a-le gi-gv a-tsv-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi, a-s-ga-nv-tsv v-tla yv-ga-yv-da-di-do-li-gi.

190923.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᏍᏗᏓᏅ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏤᎯ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎦᏅᎦᎸᏙᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ (ᏗᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗ,) ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏤᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏲᎪ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏗᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᏗᎦᏅᎦᎸᏙᏗ.
190923.english: It was therefore necessary that the patterns of things in the heavens should be purified with these; but the heavenly things themselves with better sacrifices than these.
190923.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-du-lv-di ni-ga-li-s-di-s-gv-gi hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-dv nu-s-di-da-nv ga-lv-la-di tse-hi di-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv di-ga-nv-ga-lv-do-di-yi hi-a na-s-gi (di-li-s-go-lv-do-di,) ga-lv-la-di-s-gi-ni tse-hi ge-sv na-yo-go u-tli i-di-ga-lv-quo-di di-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi di-ga-nv-ga-lv-do-di.

190924.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏭᏴᎸ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏕᎨᏒᎢ ᎩᎶ ᏧᏬᏰᏂ ᏧᏮᏔᏅᎯ ᏧᏬᏢᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ (ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ) ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎨᏒ ᏭᏴᎸ, ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏛᏁᏗᏱ;
190924.english: For Christ is not entered into the holy places made with hands, which are the figures of the true; but into heaven itself, now to appear in the presence of God for us:
190924.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-ye-no v-tla yi-wu-yv-lv ga-lv-quo-di-yu de-ge-sv-i gi-lo tsu-wo-ye-ni tsu-wv-ta-nv-hi tsu-wo-tlv-nv-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi (ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv) di-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i; ga-lv-la-di-s-gi-ni ni-ge-sv wu-yv-lv, go-hi ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv gv-ni-ge-sv i-ga-dv-ne-di-yi;
